flags.description: A white field bearing a red Nordic-style cross fimbriated in blue (a red cross with thin blue borders).

flags.name: flag of Cyprus
flags.description: A white field with a copper-orange map silhouette of the island of Cyprus centered, with two crossed green olive branches below.

flags.name: flag of Brittany
flags.description: Black and white horizontal stripes (four black, five white) in the fly, with a white canton at the hoist bearing eleven black ermine spots.

flags.name: flag of Flanders
flags.description: A yellow field bearing a black lion rampant with red claws and tongue, centered.

flags.name: flag of Belgium
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of black, yellow, and red.

flags.name: La Línea de la Concepción
flags.file: (La Línea de la Concepción) Гибралтар. Начало Испании - от Атлантического океана до Средиземного моря. - panoramio (cropped).jpg

flags.name: flag of Russia
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of white (top), blue, and red.

flags.name: Pays de la Loire

flags.name: flag of Pennsylvania
flags.description: The flag of the U.S. state of Pennsylvania consists of a dark blue field on which the state coat of arms is displayed. Horses flanking the coat of arms and a bald eagle above. "VIRTUE LIBERTY AND INDEPENDENCE" on a banner below.

flags.name: flag of Virginia
flags.description: A blue field bearing the obverse of the Virginia state seal: a standing female figure (Virtue) holding a spear and a sheathed sword, with a defeated king lying at her feet. The motto "SIC SEMPER TYRANNIS" appears below.

flags.name: flag of Texas
flags.description: A vertical blue band at the hoist bearing a single large white five-pointed star, alongside two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and red on the fly.

flags.name: flag of the State of New York
flags.description: A dark blue field bearing the state coat of arms: a shield showing a masted ship and a sloop on the Hudson River with a grassy shore and mountains, sun rising behind them.

flags.name: flag of South Carolina
flags.description: A blue field bearing a white palmetto tree in the center and a white crescent in the upper hoist corner.

flags.name: flag of Louisiana
flags.description: A blue field with the state arms in the center: a white pelican vulning herself (piercing her breast to feed her chicks) on a nest. A white ribbon below bears the state motto "UNION JUSTICE CONFIDENCE" in blue.

flags.name: flag of North Carolina
flags.description: A vertical blue band at the hoist bearing a white five-pointed star between the gold letters "N" and "C", with two gold scrolls reading "MAY 20th 1775" above and "APRIL 12th 1776" below. The fly is divided into a red horizontal band (top) and a white horizontal band (bottom).

flags.name: flag of Oregon
flags.description: A navy blue field with gold lettering "STATE OF OREGON" arched above the state escutcheon (showing a covered wagon, mountains, an ocean sunset, ships, and a banner reading "THE UNION") encircled by 33 gold stars. The date "1859" appears in gold below.

flags.name: Funchal
flags.file: Vista de Funchal desde Pico dos Barcelos, Madeira, Portugal, 2019-05-29, DD 37-44 PAN.jpg

flags.name: flag of Georgia
flags.description: A white field with a large red Saint George's cross extending to the edges, with a smaller red Bolnisi cross in each of the four white quadrants.

flags.name: flag of East Timor
flags.description: The national flag of Timor-Leste (bandeira nacional de Timor-Leste; bandeira nasionál) consists of a red field with the black isosceles triangle based on the hoist-side bearing a white five-pointed star in the center superimposed on the larger yellow triangle, also based on the hoist-side, that extends to the center of the flag.

flags.name: flag of Armenia
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), blue, and orange.

flags.name: flag of Victoria
flags.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and in the fly the Southern Cross (five white stars: four seven-pointed and one smaller five-pointed) below a white crown of Saint Edward.

flags.name: flag of Libya
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of red (top), black (double width), and green, with a white crescent and five-pointed star centered on the black band.

flags.name: flag of Lebanon
flags.description: A horizontal triband of red (top), white, and red. The white middle stripe is twice the height of each red stripe and bears a green cedar of Lebanon tree centered, touching both red stripes.

flags.name: Mercedes-Benz
flags.file: Mercedes-Benz W463 G 350 BlueTEC 05 Mercedes-Benz Museum.jpg

flags.name: Columbia
flags.file: Fall skyline of Columbia SC from Arsenal Hill.jpg

flags.name: flag of Turkmenistan
flags.description: A green field with a vertical red stripe near the hoist containing five traditional carpet medallions (göls) woven in red, black, yellow, and white with an olive branch at its base, plus a white crescent and five small white stars in the upper hoist of the green portion.

flags.name: flag of India
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of saffron, white, and green, with a navy-blue 24-spoke wheel (Ashoka Chakra) centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Poland
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white above red.

flags.name: flag of the United States of America
flags.file: Flag of the United States (DDD-F-416E specifications).svg
flags.description: Thirteen alternating red and white horizontal stripes, with a blue rectangle in the upper-left corner containing fifty white stars arranged in nine rows.

flags.name: Piauí

flags.name: flag of Italy
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of green, white, and red.

flags.name: flag of Japan
flags.description: A red disc centered on a white field.

flags.name: flag of France
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue, white, and red.

flags.name: flag of Syria
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and black, with three red five-pointed stars in a row centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Laos
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of red (top), blue (double width), and red, with a large white disc centered on the blue band.

flags.name: flag of the Netherlands
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and blue.

flags.name: flag of Austria
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and red.

flags.name: Aix-en-Provence
flags.file: Town hall of Aix-en-Provence with the flags of the State of Israel, Ukraine and Armenia (1).jpg

flags.name: flag of Finland
flags.description: A blue Nordic cross on a white field, offset toward the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Germany
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of black, red, and gold.

flags.name: International Union for Conservation of Nature
flags.flagName: International Union for Conservation of Nature

flags.name: flag of Albania
flags.description: A red field with a black double-headed eagle centered.

flags.name: LGBTQ pride flag
flags.description: Six equal horizontal stripes of red (top), orange, yellow, green, blue, and violet.

flags.name: flag of Sicily
flags.description: Divided diagonally from upper hoist to lower fly: the upper fly triangle is red, the lower hoist triangle is yellow. Centered across the boundary is the Trinacria emblem (a female head with three running legs joined at the hip and wheat ears in the hair).

flags.name: flag of Denmark
flags.description: A white Nordic cross on a red field, offset toward the hoist.

flags.name: flag of the Solomon Islands
flags.description: A blue upper triangle and green lower triangle separated by a yellow diagonal stripe running from the lower hoist to the upper fly. The blue triangle bears five white five-pointed stars arranged in a quincunx pattern.

flags.name: flag of Vatican City
flags.description: A square flag with two equal vertical bands of yellow (hoist) and white, the white half charged with the emblem of the Holy See: the crossed gold and silver keys of Saint Peter beneath a papal tiara.

flags.name: flag of Afghanistan
flags.description: A white field with the Islamic Shahada inscribed in black Arabic calligraphy across the center.

flags.name: flag of Canada
flags.description: A red and white vertical triband with a stylized red maple leaf centered on the white middle panel.

flags.name: flag of Sweden
flags.description: A yellow Nordic cross on a light blue field, offset toward the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Estonia
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), black, and white.

flags.name: flag of Lithuania
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of yellow (top), green, and red.

flags.name: flag of Andorra
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), yellow, and red, with the national coat of arms centered on the yellow band.

flags.name: flag of Australia
flags.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist quarter, a large white seven-pointed Commonwealth Star below the Union Jack, and five white stars on the fly representing the Southern Cross (one small five-pointed star and four larger seven-pointed stars).

flags.name: flag of Turkey
flags.description: A red field with a white crescent and a white five-pointed star next to it, both in the center.

flags.name: flag of Hungary
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and green.

flags.name: flag of Brazil
flags.description: A green field with a yellow rhombus in the center containing a blue disc depicting a starry sky and the Southern Cross, spanned by a curved white band inscribed "ORDEM E PROGRESSO" in green.

flags.name: flag of Ireland
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), white, and orange.

flags.name: flag of Azerbaijan
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of bright blue (top), red, and green, with a white crescent and a white eight-pointed star centered on the red band.

flags.name: flag of Norway
flags.description: A blue Nordic cross outlined in white on a red field, offset toward the hoist.

flags.name: flag of the United Kingdom
flags.description: A dark blue field overlaid by the red and white crosses of Saint George, Saint Andrew, and Saint Patrick, forming three superimposed crosses on a blue background.

flags.name: flag of Algeria
flags.description: Two equal vertical bands of green (hoist) and white, charged in the center with a red crescent and a red five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Iceland
flags.description: A sky blue field with a red Nordic cross outlined in white, offset toward the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Indonesia
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and white.

flags.name: flag of Gabon
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), yellow, and blue.

flags.name: flag of Djibouti
flags.description: A light blue upper band and green lower band separated by a white isosceles triangle extending from the hoist toward the center, with a red five-pointed star centered on the triangle.

flags.name: flag of Sudan
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and black, with a green isosceles triangle on the hoist side.

flags.name: flag of Scotland
flags.description: A white saltire (diagonal cross of Saint Andrew) on a blue field.

flags.name: flag of Honduras
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of turquoise blue (top), white, and turquoise blue, with five blue five-pointed stars arranged in a quincunx (four corners and center) on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Cape Verde
flags.description: A blue field with two horizontal stripes (white and red) in the lower half, and a ring of ten yellow five-pointed stars centered horizontally across the stripes.

flags.name: flag of Guinea-Bissau
flags.description: Divided vertically into a red band at the hoist (one-third) and a two-band fly (yellow on top, green on the bottom). A black five-pointed star sits centered on the red hoist band.

flags.name: flag of Nigeria
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), white, and green.

flags.name: flag of Ivory Coast
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of orange (hoist), white, and green.

flags.name: flag of Mauritania
flags.description: A green field with a horizontal red stripe along the top and bottom, and a centered yellow crescent (opening upward) cradling a yellow five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Haiti
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of blue (top) and red, with a white square panel in the center bearing the Haitian coat of arms (a trophy of weapons atop a green hill with a royal palm topped by a Phrygian cap; the motto "L'UNION FAIT LA FORCE" below).

flags.name: flag of Eswatini
flags.description: A red central band bordered by yellow stripes and outer blue bands (top and bottom). Centered on the red is a black-and-white Nguni shield with two yellow assegai spears and a yellow staff behind it, decorated with blue feather tassels.

flags.name: flag of Malawi
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of black (top), red, and green, with a red rising sun (semicircle with rays) centered on the black band.

flags.name: flag of Madagascar
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and green in the fly, with a vertical white band along the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Uganda
flags.description: Six equal horizontal bands of black, yellow, red, black, yellow, and red (repeating), with a white disc centered bearing a grey crowned crane facing the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Niger
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of orange (top), white, and green, with an orange disc centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Liechtenstein
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of blue (top) and red, with a gold crown in the upper hoist on the blue band.

flags.name: flag of North Korea
flags.description: A wide red horizontal stripe in the center bordered above and below by a thin white stripe and then a broad blue stripe. A red five-pointed star inside a white disc is set on the red stripe near the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Togo
flags.description: Five horizontal stripes alternating green and yellow (three green, two yellow), with a red square canton in the upper hoist bearing a white five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Burundi
flags.description: Divided by a white saltire (X-shape) edged in white into four quadrants: top and bottom are red, hoist and fly are green. A centered white disc bears three red six-pointed stars edged in green arranged in a triangle.

flags.name: flag of Grenada
flags.description: A red field bordered with six yellow five-pointed stars (three top, three bottom). Inside the border, two yellow triangles meet at the center (one from the top, one from the bottom) and two green triangles meet at the center (one from each side), forming an X pattern. A red disc with a yellow five-pointed star sits at the center. A yellow nutmeg (Grenada's national symbol) is in the hoist-side green triangle.

flags.name: flag of The Bahamas
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of aquamarine (top), yellow, and aquamarine, with a black equilateral triangle pointing toward the fly from the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Barbados
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of ultramarine blue (hoist), gold, and ultramarine blue, with a black trident head (the head of a broken trident) centered on the gold band.

flags.name: flag of Lesotho
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), white, and green, with a black Basotho hat (mokorotlo) centered on the white band.

flags.name: Callao
flags.file: Vista aérea de la Iglesia Matriz del Callao.jpg

flags.name: flag of Tuvalu
flags.description: A light blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and nine yellow five-pointed stars in the fly arranged in a pattern representing the islands of Tuvalu.

flags.name: Cook County
flags.description: A white field bearing the seal of Cook County in the center.

flags.name: Douglas County
flags.file: Second Douglas County, CO, county building IMG 5196.JPG

flags.name: flag of Kiribati
flags.description: A red field in the upper half bearing a yellow rising sun above a yellow frigatebird in flight. The lower half has six wavy horizontal stripes alternating white and blue (three white, three blue).

flags.name: flag of New Jersey
flags.description: A buff field with the New Jersey coat of arms centered: a shield with three plows, flanked by two female figures, surmounted by a horse's head atop a knight's helmet, with a banner below reading "LIBERTY AND PROSPERITY 1776".

flags.name: flag of Spain
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of red, yellow, and red, with the yellow band twice as wide as the red bands, bearing the Spanish coat of arms toward the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Mexico
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), white, and red, with the Mexican coat of arms (a golden eagle perched on a nopal cactus devouring a serpent) centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Europe
flags.description: A circle of twelve five-pointed yellow stars on a dark blue field.

flags.name: flag of Switzerland
flags.description: A square red field bearing a white Greek cross (equal-armed) centered.

flags.name: flag of Angola
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and black, with a centered yellow emblem of a half cog wheel, machete, and five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Iran
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and red, with the red Islamic Republic emblem (a stylized tulip) centered on the white band, and the Arabic takbir ("Allahu Akbar") repeated 11 times in white Kufic script along the bottom edge of the green band and the top edge of the red band.

flags.name: flag of the Czech Republic
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and red, with a blue isoceles triangle at the hoist extending to the middle of the flag.

flags.name: flag of Bangladesh
flags.description: A dark green field with a red disc centered, offset slightly toward the hoist.

flags.name: flag of South Korea
flags.description: A white field with a red-and-blue circular taegeuk symbol centered, and four black trigrams (sets of three short bars), one in each corner.

flags.name: flag of Ukraine
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of blue (top) and yellow.

flags.name: flag of Pakistan
flags.description: A vertical white stripe at the hoist (about a quarter of the flag's width), with the remaining green field bearing a white crescent moon and a white five-pointed star in the center.

flags.name: flag of Israel
flags.description: A white field with two horizontal blue stripes (one near the top, one near the bottom) and a blue Star of David (hexagram) centered.

flags.name: flag of Portugal
flags.description: A vertical bicolor of green (hoist) and red, with the Portuguese coat of arms (an armillary sphere with a red and white shield bearing five blue escutcheons and seven gold castles) centered over the colour boundary.

flags.name: flag of Greece
flags.description: Nine equal horizontal stripes of blue and white alternating (blue at the top and bottom), with a blue canton in the upper hoist bearing a white cross.

flags.name: flag of Benin
flags.description: A vertical green band at the hoist, with two horizontal bands in the fly: yellow (top) and red.

flags.name: flag of Latvia
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of red (top), white, and red; the white middle band is half the width of each red band (a so-called Latvian carmine triband).

flags.name: flag of Egypt
flags.file: Flag of Egypt (darker shade of gold).svg
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and black, with the gold Eagle of Saladin centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Bahrain
flags.description: A vertical white band at the hoist with five triangular serrations separating it from the red field that covers the rest of the flag.

flags.name: flag of Argentina
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of light blue, white, and light blue, with a yellow Sun of May (a sun face with rays) centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Slovenia
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of white (top), blue, and red, with the Slovenian coat of arms in the upper hoist spanning the white and blue bands. The shield depicts Mount Triglav in white on blue, two wavy blue lines below, and three six-pointed golden stars above arranged in an inverted triangle.

flags.name: flag of Romania
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), yellow, and red.

flags.name: flag of China
flags.file: Flag of the People's Republic of China.svg
flags.description: A red field with one large yellow five-pointed star in the upper-left, accompanied by four smaller yellow stars arcing around it.

flags.name: flag of Vietnam
flags.description: A red field with a large yellow five-pointed star centered.

flags.name: flag of Malta
flags.description: A vertical bicolor of white (hoist) and red, with a representation of the George Cross (edged in red) in the upper hoist of the white half.

flags.name: flag of Kazakhstan
flags.description: A sky blue field with a centered yellow sun of 32 rays above a yellow soaring steppe eagle. A vertical yellow band of traditional Kazakh ornamental pattern runs along the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Belarus
flags.description: A red horizontal band (top) over a green horizontal band, with a vertical white stripe at the hoist bearing a red traditional ornamental pattern.

flags.name: flag of Croatia
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and blue, with the Croatian coat of arms (a red-and-white checkerboard shield topped by five smaller shields) centered.

flags.name: flag of Luxembourg
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and light blue.

flags.name: flag of the United Arab Emirates
flags.file: Flag of the United Arab Emirates.svg
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and black, with a vertical red bar at the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Burkina Faso
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and green, with a yellow five-pointed star centered.

flags.name: flag of Bhutan
flags.description: Divided diagonally from the lower hoist to the upper fly: the upper triangle is yellow, the lower is orange. A white dragon holding white jewels in its claws straddles the diagonal, facing the fly.

flags.name: flag of the Philippines
flags.description: A horizontal bicolor of royal blue (top) and crimson red (bottom), with a white equilateral triangle at the hoist. In the center of the triangle is a golden-yellow sun with eight primary rays. Each of the triangle's three vertices bears a small five-pointed golden-yellow star.

flags.name: flag of Bolivia
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), yellow, and green, with the Bolivian coat of arms centered on the yellow band.

flags.name: flag of Thailand
flags.description: Five horizontal stripes of red, white, blue, white, and red; the central blue stripe is twice the width of each of the other four.

flags.name: flag of Senegal
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), yellow, and red, with a green five-pointed star centered on the yellow band.

flags.name: flag of the Gambia
flags.description: Five horizontal bands: red (top), white (narrow), blue, white (narrow), and green.

flags.name: flag of Antigua and Barbuda
flags.description: A red field with an inverted isosceles triangle in the center, divided horizontally into three bands of black (top), blue, and white. A yellow rising sun with rays sits centered on the black band.

flags.name: Estelada
flags.description: Four red horizontal stripes on a yellow field (alternating yellow and red), with a blue equilateral triangle at the hoist bearing a white five-pointed star (the independentist Estelada variant).

flags.name: flag of Thuringia
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and green.

flags.name: flag of Catalonia
flags.description: Nine equal horizontal stripes of red and yellow alternating (yellow at the top and bottom), giving four red stripes on a yellow field.

flags.name: flag of Sri Lanka
flags.description: At the hoist, two equal vertical bands of green and orange on a yellow border. The fly bears a maroon (dark red) rectangle on a yellow border containing a gold passant lion holding a sword, with a gold bo leaf in each corner of the maroon field.

flags.name: flag of Alaska
flags.description: A dark blue field with eight gold five-pointed stars forming the Big Dipper (seven stars) and Polaris (one star) in the upper portion of the flag.

flags.name: flag of Somalia
flags.description: A light blue field with a single large white five-pointed star centered.

flags.name: flag of Nepal
flags.description: Two stacked red triangular pennants joined at the hoist, each bordered in dark blue, forming a non-rectangular pentagonal flag. The upper pennant contains a white crescent moon; the lower contains a white sun with twelve rays.

flags.name: flag of Monaco
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and white.

flags.name: flag of Morocco
flags.description: A red field with a green five-pointed star (pentagram) centered, drawn with interlaced lines.

flags.name: flag of Cameroon
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), red, and yellow, with a yellow five-pointed star centered on the red band.

flags.name: flag of Zimbabwe
flags.description: Seven equal horizontal stripes of green, yellow, red, black, red, yellow, and green, with a white triangle at the hoist bearing a red five-pointed star and a yellow Zimbabwe Bird (soapstone bird sculpture) over the star.

flags.name: flag of Tajikistan
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of red (top), white (double width), and green, with a centered yellow crown surmounted by an arc of seven yellow five-pointed stars on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Botswana
flags.description: A light blue field with a horizontal black band edged in white, centered.

flags.name: flag of South África
flags.description: A horizontal green Y-shape fimbriated in white and gold, dividing the flag into red over blue with a black triangle at the hoist; the layout has six colors total: red, blue, green, black, white, and gold.

flags.name: flag of Peru
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of red, white, and red.

flags.name: Flag of New Zealand
flags.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist quarter, and four red five-pointed stars edged in white on the fly representing the Southern Cross.

flags.name: flag of Colombia
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of yellow (top, occupying the upper half), blue (lower quarter), and red (bottom quarter); proportions 2:1:1.

flags.name: flag of Ghana
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), yellow, and green, with a black five-pointed star centered on the yellow band.

flags.name: flag of Slovakia
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of white (top), blue, and red, with the Slovak coat of arms (a double cross on three blue hills atop a red shield) placed toward the hoist of center.

flags.name: flag of Chile
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and red, with a blue square in the upper hoist (the height of the white band) bearing a single white five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Saudi Arabia
flags.description: A solid green field bearing a white Arabic inscription (the Islamic shahada) above a white horizontal sword pointing toward the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Bosnia and Herzegovina
flags.description: A medium blue field with a yellow right triangle separating it from the hoist. Along the hypotenuse of the triangle is a diagonal line of seven full and two half five-pointed white stars.

flags.name: flag of Ethiopia
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), yellow, and red, with a blue disc centered bearing a yellow five-pointed star surrounded by rays.

flags.name: flag of Yemen
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and black.

flags.name: flag of Iraq
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and black, with the takbir ("Allahu Akbar") in green Kufic script centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Tunisia
flags.description: A red field with a white disc centered, bearing a red crescent partly surrounding a red five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Montenegro
flags.description: A red field with a wide yellow border, bearing the country's coat of arms centered: a gold double-headed eagle holding a scepter and orb, with a blue shield on its chest showing a gold lion passant on a green field.

flags.name: flag of Cambodia
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of blue (top), red (middle, double width), and blue, with a white silhouette of the three-towered Angkor Wat temple centered on the red band.

flags.name: flag of Cuba
flags.description: Five equal horizontal stripes of blue and white alternating (three blue, two white), with a red equilateral triangle at the hoist bearing a white five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of the Republic of the Congo
flags.file: Flag of the Republic of the Congo.svg
flags.description: A yellow diagonal band runs from the lower hoist to the upper fly, dividing the field into a green upper triangle and a red lower triangle.

flags.name: flag of Myanmar
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of yellow (top), green, and red, with a large white five-pointed star centered.

flags.name: flag of Serbia
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), blue, and white, with the lesser coat of arms placed toward the hoist of center.

flags.name: flag of the Democratic Republic of the Congo
flags.file: Flag of the Democratic Republic of the Congo.svg
flags.description: A sky blue field with a yellow five-pointed star in the upper hoist canton, and a red diagonal stripe (fimbriated in yellow) running from the lower hoist to the upper fly.

flags.name: flag of the Soviet Union
flags.description: A red field bearing a yellow hammer crossed with a yellow sickle in the upper hoist, surmounted by a small yellow five-pointed star outlined in yellow.

flags.name: flag of Guinea
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of red (hoist), yellow, and green.

flags.name: flag of Venezuela
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of yellow (top), blue, and red, with an arc of eight white five-pointed stars centered on the blue band.

flags.name: flag of Ecuador
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of yellow (top, occupying half the height), blue, and red, with the Ecuadorian coat of arms centered on the yellow band.

flags.name: flag of Kuwait
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and red, with a black trapezoid (a wedge with a notched edge) at the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Oman
flags.description: The national flag of Oman (Arabic: علم عُمان) consists of two horizontal stripes of upper white and lower green, separated by a red horizontal "T" shape in the centre that contains the national emblem of Oman (crossed swords over a khanjar, a traditional curved dagger).

flags.name: flag of Mongolia
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of red (hoist), blue, and red, with a yellow Soyombo emblem (a stylized column of symbols including flame, sun, moon, yin-yang and geometric shapes) centered on the hoist red band.

flags.name: flag of Kyrgyzstan
flags.description: A red field with a yellow sun centered, with 40 rays radiating outward. In the center of the sun is a red tündük (the wooden crown of a yurt) rendered as crossed bands within a circle.

flags.name: flag of the Central African Republic
flags.file: Flag of the Central African Republic.svg
flags.description: Four equal horizontal bands of blue (top), white, green, and yellow, with a vertical red stripe running down the center. A yellow five-pointed star sits in the upper hoist on the blue band.

flags.name: flag of Chad
flags.description: The national flag of Chad is a vertical tricolour of indigo, yellow, and red. It was adopted on 6 November 1959, almost a year after the founding of the autonomous Republic of Chad. Since the 1990s, its similarity to the flag of Romania has caused international discussion.

flags.name: flag of Namibia
flags.description: A red diagonal band edged in two white stripes runs from the lower hoist to the upper fly, dividing the flag into a blue upper triangle bearing a yellow sun with 12 rays and a green lower triangle.

flags.name: flag of Brunei
flags.description: A yellow field with two diagonal stripes of white (above) and black running from the upper hoist to the lower fly, with the red Bruneian coat of arms (a winged emblem with hands, a crescent, and a banner of Arabic script) centered.

flags.name: flag of Kenya
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of black, red, and green separated by thin white fimbriations, with a red, black, and white Maasai shield and two crossed spears centered.

flags.name: flag of North Macedonia
flags.description: A red field with a stylized yellow sun in the center, with eight broadening rays extending from the central disc to the edges of the flag.

flags.name: flag of Moldova
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), yellow, and red, with the Moldovan coat of arms centered on the yellow band: a stylized aurochs head with a star between its horns, flanked by a rose and crescent, on a yellow and blue shield held by an eagle.

flags.name: flag of Kosovo
flags.description: A blue field bearing a gold silhouette of the territory of Kosovo centered, with a row of six white five-pointed stars arching above.

flags.name: flag of Sierra Leone
flags.description: The national flag of Sierra Leone is a tricolor consisting of three horizontal green, white and blue bands.

flags.name: flag of the Comoros
flags.description: Four horizontal bands of yellow (top), white, red, and blue, with a green isosceles triangle at the hoist bearing a white crescent and four white five-pointed stars arranged vertically.

flags.name: flag of San Marino
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and light blue, with the national coat of arms centered: a shield with three silver towers on three green peaks, topped with a crown, flanked by an oak and a laurel branch, with a scroll below reading "LIBERTAS".

flags.name: flag of Malaysia
flags.description: Fourteen alternating equal horizontal red and white stripes, with a blue canton in the upper hoist bearing a yellow crescent and a yellow 14-point star.

flags.name: flag of Panama
flags.description: A field divided into four equal quarters: white (upper hoist) bearing a blue five-pointed star, red (upper fly), blue (lower hoist), and white (lower fly) bearing a red five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Belize
flags.description: A blue field with horizontal red stripes at the top and bottom edges. Centered is a large white disc bearing the Belize coat of arms: a shield with logging tools flanked by two woodcutters (one Black, one mestizo), beneath a mahogany tree, encircled by 50 olive leaves with a banner reading "SUB UMBRA FLOREO" below.

flags.name: flag of Maldives
flags.description: A red field with a green vertical rectangle centered, bearing a white crescent opening toward the fly.

flags.name: flag of Mali
flags.description: The national flag of Mali is a vertical tricolour of green, gold, and red, the pan-African colours.  The flag of Mali is almost identical to the flag of Guinea, with the exception that the colours are in reverse order.

flags.name: flag of São Tomé and Príncipe
flags.file: Flag of São Tomé and Príncipe.svg
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of green (top), yellow (double width), and green, with a red isosceles triangle at the hoist and two black five-pointed stars centered on the yellow band.

flags.name: flag of Jordan
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of black (top), white, and green, with a red equilateral triangle on the hoist side bearing a small white seven-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Costa Rica
flags.description: Five horizontal bands of blue, white, red, white, and blue; the central red band is twice as wide as each of the others.

flags.name: flag of Paraguay
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and blue, with the national coat of arms centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Rwanda
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of light blue (top, double width), yellow, and green, with a yellow sun with 24 rays in the upper fly of the blue band.

flags.name: flag of Equatorial Guinea
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and red, with a blue isosceles triangle at the hoist. The national coat of arms (a silk-cotton tree on a grey shield with six gold stars above and a banner reading "UNIDAD PAZ JUSTICIA" below) is centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Eritrea
flags.description: A red isosceles triangle with its base on the hoist and apex at the fly, dividing the field into a green upper triangle and a blue lower triangle. A yellow olive wreath surrounding a yellow upright olive branch sits centered on the red triangle near the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Liberia
flags.description: Eleven equal horizontal stripes of red and white alternating (six red, five white), with a blue square canton in the upper hoist bearing a single white five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Tanzania
flags.description: Divided by a yellow-edged black diagonal band running from the lower hoist to the upper fly. The upper triangle is green; the lower triangle is light blue.

flags.name: flag of Zambia
flags.description: A green field with three vertical stripes of red, black, and orange in the lower fly, and an orange African fish eagle in flight above the stripes.

flags.name: flag of Uruguay
flags.description: Nine equal horizontal stripes of white and blue alternating (white at top and bottom). A white canton in the upper hoist bears the Sun of May: a yellow face surrounded by 16 alternating triangular and wavy rays.

flags.name: flag of England
flags.description: A white field bearing a red Saint George's cross (vertical and horizontal red bands) extending to the edges.

flags.name: flag of Guyana
flags.description: A green field with two superimposed triangles based on the hoist: a white-edged red triangle (the "golden arrowhead") atop a black-edged golden triangle, both pointing toward the fly.

flags.name: flag of the United Nations
flags.description: A light blue field with the white United Nations emblem centered: a polar azimuthal projection of the world map encircled by two olive branches.

flags.name: flag of Jamaica
flags.description: A yellow saltire (diagonal cross) dividing the flag into four triangles: green at the top and bottom, black at the hoist and fly.

flags.name: flag of Qatar
flags.description: A maroon field with a vertical white serrated band at the hoist forming nine triangular points.

flags.name: flag of Nicaragua
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), white, and blue, with the national coat of arms (a triangle containing five volcanoes, a Phrygian cap, and a rainbow) centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Seychelles
flags.description: Five diagonal bands of color radiating from the lower hoist corner toward the fly: blue, yellow, red, white, and green (top to bottom).

flags.name: flag of the Republic of China
flags.file: Flag of the Republic of China.svg
flags.description: A red field with a blue canton in the upper hoist containing a white sun: a central white disc surrounded by twelve white triangular rays.

flags.name: flag of Mauritius
flags.description: Four equal horizontal bands of red (top), dark blue, yellow, and green.

flags.name: flag of El Salvador
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), white, and blue, with the national coat of arms centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of the Cayman Islands
flags.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and in the fly the Cayman Islands coat of arms: a shield with three green stars on blue and white wavy bars below a red chief bearing an English lion, surmounted by a green sea turtle on a knight's helm, with a yellow pineapple, and a white banner reading "HE HATH FOUNDED IT UPON THE SEAS".

flags.name: flag of Guatemala
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of sky blue (hoist), white, and sky blue, with the Guatemalan coat of arms centered on the white band (a resplendent quetzal perched on a scroll, with crossed rifles and crossed swords, framed by a laurel wreath).

flags.name: flag of Dominica
flags.description: A green field divided by a triple cross of yellow, black, and white bands (vertical and horizontal). A red disc centered at the intersection bears a purple sisserou parrot perched on a branch, surrounded by ten green five-pointed stars edged in yellow.

flags.name: flag of Suriname
flags.description: Five horizontal bands of green, white, red (double width), white, and green, with a large yellow five-pointed star centered on the red band.

flags.name: flag of Saint Kitts and Nevis
flags.file: Flag of Saint Kitts and Nevis.svg
flags.description: Divided diagonally from the lower hoist to the upper fly by a black band edged in yellow. The upper triangle is green; the lower triangle is red. Two white five-pointed stars are placed on the black band.

flags.name: flag of Fiji
flags.description: A light blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton and the Fijian shield centered in the fly: a white shield with a red Saint George's cross above and quartered scenes (lion, palm tree, dove, sugar cane, coconut) below.

flags.name: Jolly Roger
flags.description: A black field bearing a white skull above two white crossed bones (the classic pirate Jolly Roger).

flags.name: flag of South Sudan
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of black (top), red, and green, separated by thin white stripes, with a blue equilateral triangle at the hoist bearing a yellow five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Dominican Republic
flags.description: A field divided into four equal quarters by a white cross extending to the edges: blue (upper hoist), red (upper fly), red (lower hoist), and blue (lower fly), with the Dominican coat of arms centered on the cross.

flags.name: flag of Greenland
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and red, with a centered disc of opposite colors (red upper half on the white band, white lower half on the red band), positioned toward the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Trinidad and Tobago
flags.description: A red field with a diagonal black stripe (bend) fimbriated in white, running from the upper hoist to the lower fly.

flags.name: flag of Saint Vincent and the Grenadines
flags.file: Flag of Saint Vincent and the Grenadines.svg
flags.description: Three vertical bands of blue (hoist), yellow (double width), and green, with three green diamond shapes arranged as a V-pattern centered on the yellow band.

flags.name: flag of Saint Lucia
flags.description: A light blue field with a centered isosceles triangle made of three overlapping triangles: a white outer triangle, a black middle triangle, and a yellow inner triangle at the base.

flags.name: flag of Papua New Guinea
flags.description: A field divided diagonally from upper hoist to lower fly: the upper triangle is red bearing a yellow silhouette of a Raggiana bird-of-paradise; the lower triangle is black bearing five white stars representing the Southern Cross.

flags.name: flag of Nauru
flags.description: A dark blue field divided horizontally by a thin yellow stripe slightly below center. In the lower hoist sits a white twelve-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Vanuatu
flags.description: Two horizontal bands of red (top) and green separated by a black horizontal stripe edged in yellow. A black isosceles triangle outlined in yellow extends from the hoist with a yellow boar tusk encircling two crossed namele leaves centered.

flags.name: flag of Wales
flags.description: A horizontal bicolor of white (top) and green, with a large red passant dragon centered.

flags.name: flag of the Isle of Man
flags.file: Flag of the Isle of Man.svg
flags.description: A red field bearing the triskelion: three armoured legs joined at the hip, with golden spurs, arranged radially.

flags.name: flag of Hong Kong
flags.description: A red field with a centered stylized white five-petaled bauhinia (orchid tree) flower, each petal bearing a small red five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Tonga
flags.description: The national flag of Tonga consists of a red field with a white canton charged with a red couped cross.  Adopted in 1875 after being officially enshrined into the nation's constitution, it has been the flag of the Kingdom of Tonga since that year.  The constitution stipulates that the national flag can never be changed.

flags.name: Penang
flags.file: Skyline of George Town, Penang at night November 2024 23-9.jpg

flags.name: flag of Samoa
flags.description: A red field with a blue rectangle in the upper hoist (canton) bearing five white five-pointed stars arranged as the Southern Cross constellation.

flags.name: flag of Palau
flags.description: A light blue field with a large yellow disc centered slightly toward the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Aruba
flags.description: A light blue field with two horizontal yellow stripes near the bottom (separated by a thin blue line) and a white four-pointed star edged in red in the upper hoist.

flags.name: flag of Anguilla
flags.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and the Anguilla coat of arms in the fly (a white shield bearing three orange dolphins in a circular pattern, with a blue wavy base).

flags.name: flag of Jersey
flags.description: A white field bearing a red saltire (X-shape) extending to the corners, with the Jersey coat of arms (a red shield bearing three gold lions passant, surmounted by a gold Plantagenet crown) centered on the upper part of the cross.

flags.name: flag of Bermuda
flags.description: A red field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and the Bermuda coat of arms in the fly (a red lion holding a shield depicting the wreck of the Sea Venture).

flags.name: flag of the Federated States of Micronesia
flags.file: Flag of the Federated States of Micronesia.svg
flags.description: A light blue field bearing four white five-pointed stars arranged in a cross pattern (one top, one bottom, one each side) centered.

flags.name: Flag of Palestine
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of black (top), white, and green, with a red equilateral triangle at the hoist.

flags.name: flag of the Cook Islands
flags.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and fifteen white five-pointed stars in the fly arranged in a circle.

flags.name: flag of Abkhazia
flags.file: Flag of the Republic of Abkhazia.svg
flags.description: Seven horizontal bands alternating green and white (four green, three white). A red rectangle in the upper hoist canton bears a white open right hand surrounded by seven small white five-pointed stars in an arc.

flags.name: flag of the Marshall Islands
flags.description: A dark blue field with two diagonal stripes (orange above, white below) widening from the lower hoist to the upper fly. A large white 24-pointed star sits in the upper hoist.

flags.name: flag of Niue
flags.description: A yellow field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, with a central yellow star inside a small blue disc on the Union Jack and four smaller yellow stars at the arms of the cross.

flags.name: flag of Åland Islands
flags.description: A blue field with a yellow Nordic cross overlaid by a thinner red Nordic cross, both shifted toward the hoist.

flags.name: flag of the British Virgin Islands
flags.file: Flag of the British Virgin Islands.svg
flags.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and the British Virgin Islands coat of arms in the fly (a green shield bearing a white-robed woman holding a gold lamp, flanked by additional gold lamps, with a yellow scroll reading "VIGILATE" below).

flags.name: flag of the United States Virgin Islands
flags.file: Flag of the United States Virgin Islands.svg
flags.description: A white field bearing a yellow American eagle holding a green olive branch and three blue arrows, with a shield of red and white stripes and a blue chief on its chest. The blue letters "V" and "I" flank the eagle.

flags.name: flag of Northern Cyprus
flags.file: Flag of the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus.svg
flags.description: A white field with a red horizontal stripe near the top and another near the bottom, and a centered red crescent moon facing the fly with a red five-pointed star to its right.

flags.name: Flag of Kurdistan
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and green, with a yellow sun of 21 rays centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of the Netherlands Antilles
flags.description: A white field divided by a vertical red band and a horizontal blue band (forming a cross with the blue band wider). Five white five-pointed stars are arranged in an oval on the blue band.

flags.name: flag of Hawaiʻi
flags.description: Eight horizontal stripes alternating white, red, and blue (from top), with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton.

flags.name: flag of Massachusetts
flags.description: A white field bearing the Massachusetts coat of arms in the center: a blue shield depicting an Algonquian Native American holding a bow and arrow, with a white star in the upper hoist corner. A blue ribbon scroll wraps around the shield.

flags.name: flag of the Canary Islands
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of white (hoist), blue, and yellow.

flags.name: flag of Bulgaria
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of white (top), green, and red.

flags.name: flag of French Polynesia
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of red (top), white (double width), and red, with the French Polynesian emblem centered on the white band: a Polynesian outrigger canoe carrying five small figures, with a yellow sunburst behind and blue waves below.

flags.name: flag of Norfolk Island
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), white, and green, with a green Norfolk Island pine tree centered on the white band.

flags.name: Ikurrina
flags.description: A red field with a green diagonal saltire (Saint Andrew's cross), overlaid by a white upright cross (Saint George's cross).

flags.name: flag of Guam
flags.description: A dark blue field with a thick red border on all sides, bearing the Guam territorial seal centered: an almond-shaped emblem with a coconut palm, a flying proa boat on the bay, and a beach scene, with "GUAM" in red letters across the middle.

flags.name: flag of Macau
flags.description: A green field bearing a centered white lotus flower of three petals above white horizontal lines (water), with five small yellow five-pointed stars arched above (one large in the center, two on each side).

flags.name: flag of Wisconsin
flags.description: A blue field with the state coat of arms centered (a shield supported by a sailor and a miner, with a small "FORWARD" banner above), the word "WISCONSIN" arched above in white, and the date "1848" in white below.

flags.name: flag of Madeira
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), yellow (double width), and blue, with a red and white Cross of Christ (Order of Christ cross) centered on the yellow band.

flags.name: flag of American Samoa
flags.description: A dark blue field with a white isosceles triangle pointing toward the hoist, edged in red. In the fly half of the triangle's base sits an American bald eagle clutching a war club and a fly-whisk.

flags.name: Naperville
flags.file: City of Naperville City Hall main entrance.jpg

flags.name: flag of Montserrat
flags.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and in the fly the Montserrat coat of arms: a shield bearing a green-robed woman (Erin) embracing a Christian cross and holding a golden harp on a black ground.

flags.name: flag of New Hampshire
flags.description: A blue field bearing the New Hampshire state seal centered: the frigate USS Raleigh on water, encircled by a green laurel wreath and nine golden stars.

flags.name: flag of the Australian Capital Territory
flags.file: Flag of the Australian Capital Territory.svg

flags.name: flag of Oklahoma
flags.description: A sky-blue field bearing an Osage warrior's tan buffalo-hide shield with six small white crosses, decorated with seven pendant eagle feathers. Crossed atop the shield are a calumet (peace pipe) and an olive branch. "OKLAHOMA" appears in white capitals below.

flags.name: flag of Prince Edward Island
flags.description: A white field with a red border around the top, bottom, and fly edges decorated with white rectangles and small green oak-leaf clusters. Across the top runs a band bearing a gold passant lion. Centered below is a scene of an oak tree and three smaller saplings growing on a green island.

flags.name: flag of Kansas
flags.description: A blue field with the Kansas state seal centered (a landscape scene with mountains, a steamboat, a wagon train, and "AD ASTRA PER ASPERA" in a banner, surrounded by 34 five-pointed stars). Above the seal sits a sunflower with a yellow-and-blue twist below; "KANSAS" appears in yellow letters below.

flags.name: flag of Michigan
flags.description: A dark blue field bearing the Michigan coat of arms in the center: a light blue shield with a man on a peninsula holding a long gun, supported by an elk and a moose, beneath a golden eagle.

flags.name: flag of Mississippi
flags.description: A field with vertical bands of red, gold (narrow), navy blue (wide center), gold (narrow), and red. Centered on the blue band is a white magnolia blossom encircled by a ring of twenty white five-pointed stars, with a gold-edged star above and the words "IN GOD WE TRUST" in white below.

flags.name: flag of the Northern Mariana Islands
flags.file: Flag of the Northern Mariana Islands.svg
flags.description: A blue field bearing a centered grey latte stone surmounted by a white five-pointed star, encircled by a Carolinian mwarmwar (lei garland of pink flowers and green leaves).

flags.name: flag of California
flags.description: A white field with a wide red stripe along the bottom edge. Centered on the white field is a California grizzly bear walking on a patch of green grass, with a red five-pointed star in the upper-left. The words "CALIFORNIA REPUBLIC" appear in black below the bear.

flags.name: flag of Arkansas
flags.description: A red field with a large white lozenge (diamond) bordered in blue. The blue border contains 25 small white five-pointed stars. Inside the diamond are four blue five-pointed stars: one above the word "ARKANSAS" (in blue capitals) and three below.

flags.name: flag of Friuli-Venezia Giulia
flags.description: A blue field bearing a centered yellow bird with wings spread, standing on a grey stone wall (representation of the historical castle of Udine).

flags.name: flag of Yugoslavia (socialist and democracy eras)
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), white, and red, with a red five-pointed star edged in yellow centered.

flags.name: flag of Queensland
flags.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and in the fly a white disc bearing a light blue Maltese cross surmounted by a red royal crown.

flags.name: flag of Guadeloupe
flags.description: A white field with the Guadeloupe regional logo centered: a stylized green-and-blue square with a yellow sun and a dark blue arc above, with black text "REGION GUADELOUPE" below the logo, and a small yellow rectangle at the bottom.

flags.name: flag of Quebec
flags.description: A blue field divided by a white cross (extending to the edges) into four quarters, each bearing a white fleur-de-lis.

flags.name: flag of the Balearic Islands
flags.description: Four red horizontal stripes on a yellow field (alternating yellow and red, nine stripes total), with a purple square canton in the upper hoist bearing a white five-towered castle.

flags.name: flag of NATO
flags.description: A dark blue field with a white compass rose (a four-pointed star) in the center, encircled by a white ring with four short white lines radiating outward in the cardinal directions.

flags.name: flag of the Commonwealth of Nations
flags.description: A blue field bearing a centered yellow globe (with grid lines) inside a curving fan of 61 yellow sun rays radiating outward (forming a stylized "C" shape).

flags.name: flag of Tatarstan
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of green (top), white (very narrow), and red.

flags.name: Torres Strait Islander flag
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of green (top), blue, and green, separated by thin black lines; in the center is a white Dhari (traditional headdress) with a white five-pointed star beneath.

flags.name: flag of Singapore
flags.description: A horizontal bicolor of red (top) and white, with a white crescent moon and a pentagon of five small white five-pointed stars in the upper hoist (canton).

flags.name: flag of Uzbekistan
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of celestial blue (top), white, and green, separated by two thin red fimbriations. In the upper hoist (canton) is a white crescent moon and twelve white five-pointed stars in three rows.

flags.name: flag of Mozambique
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), black (edged in white), and yellow, with a red isosceles triangle at the hoist bearing a yellow five-pointed star charged with an open white book, a crossed AK-47 rifle, and a hoe.

flags.name: Bank of America
flags.file: Bank of America Corporate Center Charlotte, North Carolina.jpg

flags.name: flag of Wyoming
flags.description: A blue field with a wide white border framed by an outer red border, bearing a white silhouette of an American bison facing the hoist with the state seal rendered in blue centered on its flank.

flags.name: flag of Iowa
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), white, and red, with a bald eagle holding a blue streamer reading "OUR LIBERTIES WE PRIZE AND OUR RIGHTS WE WILL MAINTAIN" centered on the white stripe, with "IOWA" in red below.

flags.name: flag of Colorado
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), white, and blue. Overlaid on the stripes toward the hoist is a large red letter "C" filled with a golden disc.

flags.name: flag of Lower Saxony
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of black (top), red, and yellow, with the Lower Saxony coat of arms centered: a red shield bearing a white horse rampant.

flags.name: flag of Alabama
flags.description: A white field with a crimson Saint Andrew's cross (diagonal saltire) extending to the corners.

flags.name: flag of Maine
flags.description: A blue field bearing the Maine coat of arms centered: a shield with a pine tree and moose flanked by a farmer and a sailor, surmounted by a blue ribbon reading "DIRIGO" beneath the North Star. A banner reading "MAINE" appears below.

flags.name: flag of Manitoba
flags.file: Flag of the Province of Manitoba.svg
flags.description: A red field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton and the Manitoba provincial shield in the fly: a white shield with a red Saint George's cross above and a brown bison standing on a rock below.

flags.name: flag of Rhode Island
flags.description: A white field bearing a gold anchor centered, with a blue ribbon below reading "HOPE" in gold letters. Thirteen gold five-pointed stars are arranged in a circle around the anchor.

flags.name: flag of Vermont
flags.description: A blue field bearing the Vermont coat of arms centered: a pine tree with mountains in the background, flanked by a cow and sheaves of wheat, framed by green pine boughs, with a red deer head crest above and a red banner reading "FREEDOM AND UNITY VERMONT" below.

flags.name: Flag of Réunion
flags.description: A blue field with eleven yellow sunburst rays radiating from the lower center, with a red isosceles triangle rising from the bottom edge.

flags.name: flag of Dallas
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of red (top), white (narrow), and blue. A large white five-pointed star is centered, bearing a gold disc with the city seal (a small five-pointed star, "CITY OF DALLAS" and "TEXAS" around the rim).

flags.name: Fartura
flags.file: Igreja Nossa S Dores Fartura 200107 REFON.jpg

flags.name: flag of the Region of Murcia
flags.file: Flag of the Region of Murcia.svg
flags.description: A dark red field with four yellow castle towers arranged in a 2x2 pattern in the upper hoist corner, and seven yellow crowns arranged in a 3+2+2 pattern in the lower fly corner.

flags.name: flag of Brandenburg
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and white, with the Brandenburg coat of arms centered: a white shield bearing a red eagle with yellow beak, talons, and clover-stem decorations on its wings.

flags.name: flag of Bremen
flags.description: Eight alternating horizontal bands of red and white. The hoist has a vertical column of seven small alternating red and white squares (a checker pattern).

flags.name: flag of South Dakota
flags.description: A medium blue field with a large gold sun centered, containing the state seal in blue and white. "SOUTH DAKOTA" arches above and "THE MOUNT RUSHMORE STATE" arches below in gold.

flags.name: Cicero
flags.file: J. Sterling Morton High School East Auditorium.jpg

flags.name: flag of Asturiass
flags.description: A blue field bearing a yellow Cross of the Victory centered, with a yellow Alpha hanging from the left arm and a yellow Omega from the right arm.

flags.name: flag of Buenos Aires
flags.file: Bandera de la Ciudad de Buenos Aires.svg

flags.name: flag of Kentucky
flags.description: A navy blue field with the Commonwealth seal centered. Two figures embrace within the seal, encircled by the words "COMMONWEALTH OF KENTUCKY" above and sprigs of goldenrod below.

flags.name: United States Department of Veterans Affairs
flags.flagName: United States Department of Veterans Affairs

flags.name: Organization of Turkic States
flags.file: Headquarter of The Organization of Turkic States in 2022 (1).jpg

flags.name: Flag of Cundinamarca
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of light blue (top), yellow, and red, with the Cundinamarca coat of arms centered: a white circular emblem framed in black with "GOB.O LIBRE E INDEP.TE DE CUNDIN.A" arched around an eagle holding the local arms.

flags.name: flag of the Northern Territory
flags.description: A vertical bicolor of black (hoist, narrow) and ochre (orange-brown). The black band bears the Southern Cross constellation in white seven-pointed stars; the ochre fly bears a stylized white Sturt's desert rose with seven petals around a black center.

flags.name: flag of Castilla-La Mancha
flags.description: Divided vertically into two equal halves: a red field at the hoist bearing a yellow three-towered castle, and a plain white field in the fly.

flags.name: flag of Nova Scotia
flags.description: A white field bearing a blue saltire extending to the edges, with the royal arms of Scotland (a gold shield with a red lion rampant) centered.

flags.name: flag of Tennessee
flags.description: A red field with a vertical blue stripe along the fly, bordered by a thin white stripe. In the center of the red field is a blue circle bordered in white containing three white five-pointed stars.

flags.name: flag of Marche
flags.description: A white field bearing a centered green and black shield-shaped emblem: a green outline of a shield enclosing a black stylized woodpecker holding a pen.

flags.name: St George's Cross
flags.description: A white field bearing a red Saint George's cross (vertical and horizontal red bands) extending to the edges.

flags.name: Flag of Wallonia
flags.description: A yellow field bearing a stylized red rooster (the "coq hardi") facing the hoist with one leg raised.

flags.name: flag of Toronto
flags.description: A blue field with two white vertical bars connected by a white horizontal bar at the top forming a stylized double-T shape (representing Toronto City Hall towers). A red maple leaf sits centered between the lower legs of the T.

flags.name: flag of Provence
flags.description: Alternating vertical stripes of yellow and red.

flags.name: Tallinn flag
flags.description: Five equal horizontal bands of blue and white alternating (three blue, two white).

flags.name: flag of the Azores
flags.description: A vertical bicolor of dark blue (hoist) and white, with a yellow goshawk in flight centered across the boundary, surmounted by an arc of nine small yellow five-pointed stars. A red and white Portuguese shield sits in the upper hoist canton.

flags.name: flag of Arizona
flags.description: Thirteen rays of red and gold alternating in the top half of the flag (six red and seven gold, or vice versa). A copper-colored five-pointed star is centered, with the bottom half of the flag in dark blue.

flags.name: flag of Montana
flags.description: A blue field with the state seal centered (a circular scene of mountains, the Great Falls of the Missouri River, plow, miner's tools, and the motto "ORO Y PLATA" on a banner). The word "MONTANA" is in yellow above the seal.

flags.name: flag of Newfoundland and Labrador
flags.description: A white field bearing a stylized design: at the hoist two blue triangles meeting at center; in the fly two red triangles forming an open arrow shape, with a yellow arrow extending toward the fly between them.

flags.name: flag of British Columbia
flags.description: A horizontal flag divided into three parts: the top third is a Union Jack defaced in the center with a golden crown, while the bottom two-thirds shows a setting golden sun over wavy blue and white horizontal lines.

flags.name: flag of New Mexico
flags.description: A gold (yellow) field with a stylized red sun symbol (the Zia sun) centered: a central red disc with four groups of four straight rays radiating outward in the cardinal directions.

flags.name: flag of Hamburg
flags.description: A red field bearing a white three-towered castle (the central tower with a cross, flanked by two with six-pointed stars above) outlined in black, centered.

flags.name: flag of Mecklenburg-Vorpommern
flags.description: Five horizontal bands of blue (top), white, yellow (narrow), white, and red.

flags.name: flag of Indiana
flags.description: A blue field with a gold flaming torch centered, surrounded by a ring of thirteen gold five-pointed stars with five additional stars in an inner arc. A nineteenth larger star sits above the torch flame, with the word "INDIANA" arched above it in gold.

flags.name: flag of Georgia
flags.file: Flag of the State of Georgia.svg
flags.description: Three horizontal stripes of red, white, and red, with a blue canton in the upper hoist containing a ring of 13 white five-pointed stars encircling the state coat of arms in gold. "IN GOD WE TRUST" appears below the coat of arms.

flags.name: flag of canton of Zürich
flags.description: A square field divided diagonally from the upper hoist to the lower fly: the lower-left triangle is blue, the upper-right triangle is white.

flags.name: flag of Saxony-Anhalt
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of yellow (top) and black, with the Saxony-Anhalt coat of arms centered: a shield divided into a black and gold bendy field with a green crancelin (curved wreath) above and a red battlement with a black bear below.

flags.name: flag of North Rhine-Westphalia
flags.description: The flag of the German State of North Rhine-Westphalia is a horizontal tricolor consisting of green, white and red.

flags.name: flag of Saskatchewan
flags.description:
The provincial flag of Saskatchewan was adopted in 1969. Its upper half is green and contains the coat of arms of Saskatchewan, and its lower half is yellow. In the fly of the flag is a western red lily, the provincial flower. 

In 2017, The Minister of Parks, Culture and Sports designated 22 September as Saskatchewan Flag Day.

flags.name: flag of Saxony
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and green.

flags.name: flag of Saarland
flags.description: The flag of Saarland is based on the flag of Germany and is a black, red, and gold horizontal tricolor. In the center of the flag is the coat of arms of Saarland. The flag of Saarland is both the civil flag (Landesflagge), as well as the state service flag (Landesdienstflagge).

flags.name: flag of Rhineland-Palatinate
flags.description: The flag of Rhineland-Palatinate, also known as Rhineland-Pfalz, is a tricolor of three horizontal bands of black, red and gold.  These colors are Germany's national colors and are sometimes referred to as schwarz-rot-gold.  In the canton, or the upper left corner, is the coat of arms of the state of Rhineland-Palatinate.

flags.name: flag of Schleswig-Holstein
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), white, and red, with the Schleswig-Holstein coat of arms centered: a shield divided vertically, the hoist half yellow bearing two blue lions, the fly half red bearing a white nettle leaf.

flags.name: flag of Baden-Württemberg
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of black (top) and yellow.

flags.name: flag of Bavaria
flags.description: A field of white and blue lozenges (diamond shapes) in an angled diagonal pattern.

flags.name: flag of Florida
flags.description: A red saltire (diagonal cross) on a white field, with the state seal of Florida superimposed at the center.

flags.name: flag of Washington
flags.description: A dark green field with the Washington state seal centered: a portrait of George Washington encircled by the words "THE SEAL OF THE STATE OF WASHINGTON 1889" in gold.

flags.name: flag of Nebraska
flags.description: A blue field bearing the Nebraska state seal centered, rendered in gold and silver.

flags.name: flag of Utah
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of blue (top), white, and red (the white band wider than the others). On the white band is a gold-outlined blue hexagon containing a gold beehive above a five-pointed white star.

flags.name: flag of Idaho
flags.description: A blue field bearing the Idaho state seal centered (a circular emblem showing a woman with liberty cap and a miner flanking a shield with mountains, river, and farm scene, with the motto "ESTO PERPETUA"). Below the seal a red banner edged in gold reads "STATE OF IDAHO".

flags.name: flag of Melilla
flags.description: A blue field bearing a centered Spanish coat of arms: a quartered shield with castles and lions framed by columns of Hercules with red ribbons reading "NON PLVS VLTRA", surmounted by a gold royal crown.

flags.name: flag of Missouri
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, and blue, with the Missouri state coat of arms centered.

flags.name: flag of Ohio
flags.description: A red, white, and blue swallowtail (triangular-cut) flag. Two horizontal red stripes top and bottom flank a white middle stripe, with a blue triangular peak at the hoist bearing 13 white stars around a red disc.

flags.name: flag of Nevada
flags.description: A cobalt blue field with the state seal in the upper hoist quarter: a silver wreath of sagebrush with two yellow scrolls reading "BATTLE BORN" above and "NEVADA" below, around a white five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Delaware
flags.description: A colonial blue field with a buff-colored diamond centered bearing the Delaware coat of arms (a farmer and a militiaman flanking a shield with cattle, wheat, and a ship, with a banner reading "LIBERTY AND INDEPENDENCE"). Below the diamond the date "DECEMBER 7, 1787" appears in white.

flags.name: flag of Maryland
flags.description: A heraldic banner of arms divided into four quarters: two quarters bear the black and gold paly-bendy arms of the Calvert family; the other two bear the red and white quartered cross bottony of the Crossland family.

flags.name: flag of Connecticut
flags.description: A royal blue field bearing a white baroque shield with three grapevines, each carrying three bunches of purple grapes, with a white banner below reading "QUI TRANSTULIT SUSTINET".

flags.name: flag of Illinois
flags.description: A white field bearing the central elements of the state seal: a bald eagle in profile perched on a rock, wings uplifted, holding a shield and a banner in its beak, with a rising sun over water in the background. The word "Illinois" appears below.

flags.name: flag of Andalusia
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and green, with the Andalusian coat of arms (a standing figure of Hercules between two pillars and two lions) optionally centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Extremadura
flags.file: Flag of Extremadura, Spain (with coat of arms).svg
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and black, with the Extremadura coat of arms centered on the white band: a quartered shield with a yellow lion, a castle, a holm oak, and blue waves, surmounted by a gold royal crown.

flags.name: flag of Aragon
flags.description: Four equal horizontal red bands on a yellow field (alternating yellow and red stripes), with the Aragonese coat of arms centered: a quartered shield bearing the cross of Sobrarbe, the cross of Iñigo Arista, two Moors' heads, and the Aragon pales, surmounted by a gold crown.

flags.name: Australian White Ensign
flags.description: A white field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and in the fly the Southern Cross constellation (five seven-pointed blue stars) plus a larger Commonwealth Star (a seven-pointed blue star) in the lower hoist.

flags.name: flag of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations
flags.description: The Flag of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations or the ASEAN Flag is one of the official symbols of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN). It consists of the official emblem of ASEAN on a blue background.

flags.name: flag of the League of Arab States
flag of Friuli
flags.description: A blue field bearing a centered yellow eagle with wings spread and red claws.

flags.name: flag of Tristan da Cunha
flags.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and the Tristan da Cunha coat of arms in the fly (a shield bearing the Tristan rockhopper penguin and waves, flanked by two large brown rock lobsters, with a small sailboat on a crest above and a blue ribbon below).

flags.name: flag of Berlin
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of red (top, narrow), white (wide), and red (bottom, narrow), with a black bear rampant facing the hoist slightly left of center on the white band.

flags.name: Federal Way
flags.file: Five Mile Lake Park, Auburn, WA.jpg

flags.name: Franco-Ontarian flag
flags.description: Divided vertically: the hoist half is green bearing a white fleur-de-lis; the fly half is white bearing a green trillium flower outline.

flags.name: flag of Minnesota
flags.description: A dark blue field at the hoist in the shape of the state of Minnesota bearing an eight-pointed white star, with the rest of the flag a light blue field.

flags.name: flag of Gdańsk
flags.description: A red field with a golden five-pointed crown above two white square crosses, the three emblems stacked vertically and offset toward the hoist.

flags.name: flag of North Dakota
flags.description: A blue field bearing a bald eagle with wings spread, holding an olive branch and arrows, with a red, white, and blue shield on its chest. A red banner reading "E PLURIBUS UNUM" is in its beak; a fan of golden rays and thirteen white five-pointed stars arches above. A red and gold banner reading "NORTH DAKOTA" appears below.

flags.name: flag of West Virginia
flags.description: A white field with a navy blue border, bearing the state coat of arms centered: two men flanking a rock inscribed "June 20, 1863" with mining and farming tools, surrounded by a wreath of green rhododendron with red flowers, beneath a red banner reading "STATE OF WEST VIRGINIA" and above a red ribbon reading "MONTANI SEMPER LIBERI".

flags.name: flag of Budapest
flags.description: A white field bearing the Budapest coat of arms centered — a quartered red shield ensigned with the Hungarian Holy Crown, supported by two golden lions. The top and bottom edges of the flag are bordered by a row of alternating red and green triangles (a stylized Hungarian Árpád motif).

flags.name: flag of Adjara
flags.description: A field of seven alternating blue and white horizontal stripes (four blue, three white). A red square canton in the upper hoist bears a centered red cross with four red Bolnisi-style crosses (one in each quadrant).

flags.name: flag of Ceuta
flags.description: A field of eight black and white triangles meeting at the center (gyronny pattern). Centered is the Ceuta coat of arms: a red shield bearing a Portuguese-style shield with five small blue shields (with white roundels) and a red bordure with seven small castles, surmounted by a gold royal crown.

flags.name: flag of Washington, D.C.
flags.description: A white field with two horizontal red stripes in the lower half and three red five-pointed stars arranged horizontally near the top.

flags.name: Port Authority of New York and New Jersey
flags.flagName: Port Authority of New York and New Jersey

flags.name: flag of South Australia
flags.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and a yellow disc in the fly bearing a black piping shrike (white-backed magpie) with wings outstretched.

flags.name: flags of the Confederate States of America
flags.flagName: flags of the Confederate States of America
flags.description: A first-pattern Confederate States flag: three equal horizontal bands of red, white, and red, with a blue canton at the upper hoist bearing a ring of white five-pointed stars.

flags.name: Gadsden flag
flags.description: A yellow field bearing a centered coiled rattlesnake on green grass, with "DONT TREAD ON ME" in black letters below.

flags.name: flag of the Land of Valencia
flags.description: Four red horizontal stripes on a yellow field in the fly, with a vertical blue band at the hoist decorated with yellow acanthus-leaf ornament. A vertical column of red, white, and green roundels and small enameled charges runs between the blue band and the striped field.

flags.name: flag of Galicia
flags.description: A white field with a celestial blue diagonal band running from the upper hoist to the lower fly.

flags.name: flag of the City of São Paulo
flags.file: Bandeira da cidade de São Paulo.svg
flags.description: A white field bearing a centered red Cross of the Order of Christ (broad red cross with arms widening at the ends) and a smaller white circular medallion at the center bearing the São Paulo coat of arms (a yellow shield with branches surmounted by a gold mural crown, with a red banner reading "NON DVCOR DVCO").

flags.name: Río Grande
