flags.file: Zarzal, Río Grande 00745, Puerto Rico - panoramio (1).jpg

flags.name: Arlington Heights
flags.file: Banta, Nathaniel Moore House (Arlington Heights, IL) 02.JPG

flags.name: flag of Friesland
flags.description: A field of diagonal stripes (white and blue, alternating, running from upper hoist to lower fly), with seven red pompeblêden (water-lily leaf shapes) scattered across the white stripes.

flags.name: Bureau of International Expositions
flags.file: Siège du Bureau international des Expositions Paris.jpg

flags.name: University of National and World Economy
flags.flagName: University of National and World Economy

flags.name: United States Army Corps of Engineers
flags.flagName: United States Army Corps of Engineers
flags.description: A white field bearing the USACE castle emblem centered: a red diamond outlined in grey containing a stylized red castle (three towers and a connecting wall) over a small white globe.

flags.name: flag of New South Wales
flags.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and a white disc on the fly bearing a red Saint George's cross with a gold lion passant guardant in the center and an eight-pointed gold star on each arm.

flags.name: flag of Castile and León
flags.description: A field divided into four quarters: a red quarter with a golden three-towered castle (upper hoist and lower fly) alternating with a white quarter bearing a purple lion rampant (upper fly and lower hoist).

flags.name: Assyrian flag
flags.file: Flag of the Assyrians (gold and blue Assur).svg
flags.description: A white field with four wavy ribbons (two red, two blue) radiating from a central blue and white four-pointed star with an orange disc, toward the four corners. Above the star sits the symbol of Ashur (a winged sun disc above a male figure).

flags.name: Christian Flag
flags.description: A white field with a small blue canton in the upper hoist containing a red Latin cross.

flags.name: flag of Cantabria
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and red, with the Cantabria coat of arms centered: a red shield bearing the white Torre de Hércules tower beside a blue sailing ship on blue waves, surmounted by a gold royal crown, with a grey medallion below.

flags.name: flag of Western Australia
flags.description: A blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and a yellow disc in the fly bearing a black swan facing the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Navarre
flags.description: A red field bearing the arms of Navarre centered: a red shield with a gold chain pattern (linked gold rings forming a cross and saltire) with a green emerald at the center, surmounted by a gold royal crown.

flags.name: flag of Piedmont
flags.description: A red field bordered in blue, bearing a centered white cross extending toward the edges. A blue band with white inner ribbon (a label) crosses the upper part of the cross horizontally.

flags.name: flag of Alberta
flags.description: A dark blue field bearing the Alberta provincial coat of arms centered: a shield with a red Saint George's cross above a white sky, blue snowy mountains, green hills, and a golden wheat field.

flags.name: Buddhist flag
flags.description: Six vertical stripes in blue, yellow, red, white, orange, and a sixth band combining all five colors.

flags.name: flag of Lombardy
flags.description: A green field bearing a stylized white five-petal Lombard rose (Camunian rose / rosa camuna) centered.

flags.name: flag of Rio de Janeiro
flags.file: Bandeira do estado do Rio de Janeiro.svg
flags.description: Divided by a diagonal blue band (a bend) from upper hoist to lower fly, with the upper triangle white and lower triangle light blue (and additional quarters mirrored). Centered is the Rio de Janeiro state coat of arms: an oval shield with mountain silhouette and ribbon, surrounded by a green wreath, with "ESTADO DO RIO DE JANEIRO" on a white ribbon below.

flags.name: flag of Ontario
flags.description: A red field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and the Ontario shield (cross of Saint George above three gold maple leaves on green) centered on the fly.

flags.name: Wiphala
flags.description: A square field made of a 7x7 grid of colored squares, with the rainbow colors (white, yellow, orange, red, purple, blue, green) arranged diagonally to form stripes running from the upper hoist to the lower fly.

flags.name: flag and coat of arms of the canton of St. Gallen
flags.file: Flag of Canton of Sankt Gallen 2011.svg
flags.flagName: flag and coat of arms of the canton of St. Gallen
flags.description: A green field bearing a centered white fasces (a bundle of white rods bound by a green ribbon in an X pattern, with a white axe head emerging from the top).

flags.name: Australian Aboriginal flag
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of black (top) and red, with a large yellow disc (sun) centered.

flags.name: flag of Aargau
flags.description: Divided vertically: the hoist half is black with three wavy white horizontal bars; the fly half is blue bearing three white five-pointed stars edged in black.

flags.name: flag of the canton of Thurgau
flags.description: Divided diagonally from upper hoist to lower fly: the upper triangle is white, the lower triangle is green. Two yellow lions rampant (one in each triangle) face the diagonal.

flags.name: Q1392158
flags.description: A square red field with a small white cross in the upper hoist corner.

flags.name: Flag and coat of arms of Geneva and Canton of Geneva
flags.flagName: Flag and coat of arms of Geneva and Canton of Geneva
flags.description: Divided vertically: the hoist half is yellow bearing a black half-eagle with red claws and a small red crown; the fly half is red bearing a yellow key with intricate bow.

flags.name: flag of Chicago
flags.description: Three horizontal white bands separated by two light-blue bands, with four red six-pointed stars centered on the broad middle white band.

flags.name: flag of New York City
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), white, and orange, with the New York City seal in blue centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of New Brunswick
flags.description: A horizontal flag divided in thirds. The top third is a red field bearing a gold lion passant; the bottom two-thirds is a gold field with a black lymphad (medieval ship) above blue and white wavy horizontal lines.

flags.name: Kroaz Du
flags.description: A white field bearing a black cross (vertical and horizontal black bands) extending to the edges.

flags.name: flag of the Community of Madrid
flags.file: Flag of the Community of Madrid.svg
flags.description: A crimson red field with seven white five-pointed stars arranged in two rows (four above, three below) representing the seven historical districts of Madrid.

flags.name: flag of the Northwest Territories
flags.description: Three vertical bands of blue (hoist), white (double width), and blue, with the Northwest Territories shield centered on the white band: a quartered shield showing wavy white and blue at top (the Northwest Passage), a red ribbon (the tree line), green areas with gold ingots (mineral wealth), and a white fox head on red.

flags.name: flag of La Rioja
flags.description: Four equal horizontal bands of red (top), white, green, and yellow.

flags.name: flag of Montreal
flags.description: A white field divided by a red cross (vertical and horizontal red bands). The four quarters each bear a different emblem: a blue fleur-de-lis (upper hoist), a red Lancastrian rose (upper fly), a purple thistle (lower hoist), and a green shamrock (lower fly).

flags.name: flag of Nunavut
flags.description: Two equal vertical bands of yellow (hoist) and white, with a red inukshuk (stone landmark figure) centered on the boundary and a blue five-pointed star in the upper fly.

flags.name: leather flag
flags.file: Leather, Latex, and BDSM pride - Light.svg
flags.description: Nine alternating horizontal bands of dark blue and black (with white stripes between), with a large red heart in the upper hoist corner.

flags.name: National League of Families POW/MIA flag
flags.description: A black field with a white silhouette of a head in profile, a guard tower, and a strand of barbed wire, with the text "POW * MIA" above and "YOU ARE NOT FORGOTTEN" below.

flags.name: Franconian Rake
flags.description: A shield (Frankenrechen / Franconian Rake) divided horizontally: the upper half red, the lower half white, separated by a jagged line of three sharp white peaks rising into the red.

flags.name: White Ensign
flags.file: Naval ensign of the United Kingdom.svg
flags.description: A white field bearing a red Saint George's cross (vertical and horizontal red bands), with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton.

flags.name: Albert Heijn
flags.file: Albert Heijn Headquarters by Niels Kim.jpg

flags.name: flag of South Vietnam
flags.description: A yellow field with three horizontal red stripes through the middle.

flags.name: Royal Standard of the United Kingdom
flags.file: Royal standard of the United Kingdom.svg
flags.flagName: Royal Standard of the United Kingdom
flags.description: Quartered: upper hoist and lower fly red bearing three gold lions passant (England); upper fly yellow bearing a red lion rampant within a red double tressure (Scotland); lower hoist blue bearing a gold harp with a white winged maiden (Ireland).

flags.name: Confederate Battle Flag
flags.description: A square red field bearing a blue saltire (diagonal cross) edged in white, with thirteen white five-pointed stars arranged along the saltire's arms.

flags.name: flag of La Pampa
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de La Pampa.svg
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of light blue (top), white, and light blue, with the La Pampa coat of arms centered on the white band (an oval emblem with a green tree, mountains, a gaucho on horseback, and crossed lances behind, with a sunburst above).

flags.name: flag of Rotterdam
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and green.

flags.name: Lion of Saint Mark
flags.file: Facade of Scuola Grande di San Marco (Venice) - Lion of San Marco.jpg

flags.name: flag of Baden
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of yellow (top), red (middle, narrower), and yellow.

flags.name: flag of Flevoland
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of blue (top), yellow (with wavy boundaries), and green. A stylized white fleur-de-lis sits in the upper hoist on the blue band.

flags.name: Saint Piran's flag
flags.description: A black field bearing a white cross extending to the edges.

flags.name: flag of Ceará
flags.description: A green field bearing a large yellow diamond centered with a white disc inside. Within the disc is the Ceará coat of arms (a green shield with a sailing ship, palm tree, mountains, and a star).

flags.name: flag of Moscow
flags.description: A crimson red field bearing a centered figure of Saint George (in armor with a blue cloak) on horseback, spearing a black dragon beneath the horse.

flags.name: flag of Tierra del Fuego
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de Tierra del Fuego.svg
flags.description: Divided diagonally by a stylized white albatross silhouette running from upper hoist to lower fly. The upper triangle (fly side) is blue bearing five white stars of the Southern Cross; the lower triangle (hoist side) is orange.

flags.name: flag of Pomeranian Voivodeship
flags.description: A yellow field bearing a black griffin rampant facing the hoist, with a red tongue.

flags.name: Pan-African flag
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), black, and green.

flags.name: Flag of La Rioja Province, Argentina
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de La Rioja.svg
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and light blue, with a wide red diagonal band running from upper hoist to lower fly. A green laurel wreath with red berries is centered on the boundary.

flags.name: flag of Lorraine
flags.description: A yellow field bearing a red diagonal band (bend) running from the upper hoist to the lower fly, charged with three white alerions (heraldic eagles without beaks or feet).

flags.name: flag of Yukon
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), white, and blue, with the Yukon coat of arms centered on the white band (a shield with a red triangle below a base of white and blue wavy stripes, two gold roundels, surmounted by a Malamute dog standing on snow), with fireweed sprigs framing it below.

flags.name: Flag of Tucumán
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de Tucumán.svg
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of white (top), light blue, and white.

flags.name: flag of Tocantins
flags.description: Divided diagonally into three sections by two parallel lines: upper hoist blue (small triangle), white middle band, lower fly yellow (small triangle). A yellow sun with rays sits centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Salta
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de Salta.svg
flags.description: A dark red field with a horizontal black stripe near the top and bottom. Centered is an oval emblem with a light blue interior bearing a white six-pointed star with a small sun face inside, surrounded by a yellow border with small yellow seven-pointed stars.

flags.name: flag of Saint Petersburg
flags.description: A red field bearing two crossed white anchors (a sea anchor and a river anchor) centered, with a yellow scepter topped by the imperial double-headed eagle of Russia rising vertically through the cross of the anchors.

flags.name: flag of Sarawak
flags.description: A yellow field crossed diagonally from upper hoist to lower fly by two parallel bands — a red band over a black band. Centered on the bands is a nine-pointed yellow star.

flags.name: flag of Utrecht
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and red, with a red square in the upper hoist bearing a small white cross extending to its edges.

flags.name: flag of Limburg
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of white (top), blue, and yellow, with a red crowned lion rampant facing the hoist centered (overlapping all three bands).

flags.name: flag of the State of São Paulo
flags.file: Bandeira do estado de São Paulo.svg
flags.description: Thirteen alternating horizontal stripes of black and white, with a red canton in the upper hoist bearing a white disc with a blue silhouette of Brazil, flanked by four yellow five-pointed stars (one in each corner of the canton).

flags.name: flag of Roraima
flags.description: Divided by a wavy white horizontal band into a blue upper section (with a diagonal triangle from upper hoist) and a green lower triangle, with a red horizontal stripe near the bottom. A large yellow five-pointed star is centered.

flags.name: flag of San Luis Province
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de San Luis.svg
flags.description: A white field bearing the San Luis coat of arms centered: a green laurel wreath surrounding an oval scene of red mountains under a yellow sun with a blue sky, with two deer on a green plain below.

flags.name: flag of Formosa Province
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de Formosa.svg
flags.description: A light blue field with a large white triangle pointing downward from the top edge to the bottom center. A row of green chevrons spans horizontally across the middle. In the upper white triangle sits a ring of seven yellow four-pointed stars (the Southern Cross constellation).

flags.name: flag of Veneto
flags.description: A field bordered with a decorative copper and gold pattern, bearing a central panel with a winged golden lion of Saint Mark (gold body, white wings, halo) on a dark blue ground holding an open book. A vertical column of seven small coats of arms (one for each Venetian province) runs along the fly.

flags.name: flag of Perlis
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of yellow (top) and blue.

flags.name: flag of Santa Catarina
flags.description: Five horizontal bands of red, white, red, white, red, with a large green diamond centered (overlapping all five bands) bearing the state coat of arms (a white five-pointed star with an eagle and key emblem, surrounded by wheat, foliage, and a red banner reading "ESTADO DE STA CATARINA").

flags.name: flag of Flemish Brabant
flags.description: A black field bearing a centered gold (yellow) lion rampant with red claws and tongue, holding a small shield with the red and white striped flag of Austria across its chest.

flags.name: Flag of Mendoza Province
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de Mendoza.svg
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and light blue, with the Mendoza coat of arms centered: an oval cartouche showing two clasped hands holding a pike topped with a red Phrygian cap, framed by a green laurel wreath, with the Andes mountain peaks and a golden sunburst above.

flags.name: flag of Santa Fe Province
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de Santa Fe.svg
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of red (hoist), white, and light blue, with the Santa Fe provincial coat of arms centered on the white band (a yellow oval bearing crossed arrows and an axe, encircled by black text reading "PROVINCIA INVENCIBLE DE SANTA FE").

flags.name: flag of North Brabant
flags.description: A checkerboard pattern of red and white squares (six columns by four rows).

flags.name: flag of Hainaut
flags.description: Quartered: upper hoist and lower fly yellow bearing a black lion rampant; upper fly and lower hoist yellow bearing a red lion rampant.

flags.name: flag of Corsica
flags.description: A white field bearing a black silhouette of a Moor's head in profile facing the hoist, wearing a white headband (the Moor of Corsica).

flags.name: flag of Drenthe
flags.description: A white field with a horizontal red stripe along the top and bottom. Centered between them, six red five-pointed stars (three to each side) flank a black tower silhouette.

flags.name: flag of Misiones Province
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de Misiones.svg
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), blue, and white.

flags.name: flag of Bahia
flags.description: Four equal horizontal bands of white (top), red, white, and red, with a blue square in the upper hoist (the height of two stripes) bearing a white isosceles triangle pointing upward.

flags.name: flag of Antioquia Department
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and green.

flags.name: flag of Corrientes Province
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de Corrientes.svg
flags.description: A light blue field with a white horizontal band centered (with a triangular cutout at the hoist pointing into the band). Black letters "PATRIA - LIBERTAD" appear on the left and "CONSTITUCIÓN" on the right of the band, with the Argentine coat of arms centered.

flags.name: Cross of Burgundy
flags.description: A white field bearing a red saltire formed of two diagonal raguly (jagged-edged) bands resembling crossed pruned tree branches (the Cross of Burgundy).

flags.name: flag of the Federal District
flags.description: A white field bearing a centered green square with four yellow arrows pointing outward from a small green diamond at the center (forming a compass-rose / cross pattern).

flags.name: flag of Overijssel
flags.description: Five horizontal bands: red (narrow top), yellow, blue wavy band (middle), yellow, red (narrow bottom).

flags.name: Flag of Santiago del Estero Province
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de Santiago del Estero.svg
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of light blue (hoist), red, and light blue, with a yellow sun bearing a vertical red cross centered on the red band, with two narrow black horizontal stripes (one near top, one near bottom) running across all three bands.

flags.name: Rot un Wiss
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and white.

flags.name: Bonnie Blue Flag
flags.description: A solid dark blue field with a single large white five-pointed star centered.

flags.name: flag of Great Britain
flags.description: A blue field bearing the Union Flag (without the saltire of Saint Patrick): a white Saint Andrew's saltire overlaid by a red Saint George's cross fimbriated in white.

flags.name: Cantabrian labarum
flags.description: A magenta (pink-red) field bearing a stylized yellow Cantabrian Labarum centered: four curved arches arranged in a cross-like pattern with circular nodes at each end and a small central disc.

flags.name: flag of Chernihiv Oblast
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of green (top) and green separated by a thin white stripe, with the Chernihiv coat of arms in the upper hoist canton (a black double-headed eagle holding a blue shield bearing a yellow trident, surmounted by three small crowns).

flags.name: white-red-white flag
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of white (top), red, and white (the red band roughly equal in width to the upper white band).

flags.name: flag of Murmansk Oblast
flags.description: Two horizontal bands of blue (top, double width) and red, with a yellow arched silhouette of the aurora borealis spanning the blue band.

flags.name: Q2387786
flags.description: Quartered: upper hoist and lower fly are blue with three yellow fleurs-de-lis (two over one); upper fly and lower hoist are bendy blue and yellow (alternating diagonal stripes). The entire flag is bordered by a checked pattern of red and white.

flags.name: Añasco
flags.file: Puente del Río Grande de Añasco.jpg

flags.name: Calumet Park
flags.file: Platform at Ashland Calumet Park, looking northeast (52951443276).jpg

flags.name: flag of Entre Ríos Province
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de Entre Ríos.svg
flags.description: Four horizontal bands of light blue (top), white, light blue, white (alternating) with a wide red diagonal band running from the upper hoist to the lower fly.

flags.name: flag of Buenos Aires Province
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de Buenos Aires.svg
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of light blue (top) and green, separated by a thin red line, with a centered emblem of a yellow sun (with a red bottom half) inside a blue gear, surrounded by a green laurel wreath.

flags.name: flag of Tver Oblast
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of yellow (hoist), red, and yellow, with a yellow throne and gold cushion bearing a black crown centered on the red band.

flags.name: flag of Franche-Comté
flags.description: A blue field semé (strewn) with small yellow rectangular billets, bearing a centered crowned gold lion rampant facing the hoist with red claws and tongue.

flags.name: Solidaris
flags.file: Solidaris NVSM-UNMS headquarters, Place Saint-Jean, Brussels, 2025.jpg

flags.name: flag of the Brussels-Capital Region
flags.description: A blue field bearing a stylized white-edged grey iris flower centered, with two yellow petals at the base.

flags.name: Flag of San Juan Province, Argentina
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de San Juan (1997-2018).svg
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of light blue (top), white, and light blue, with the Argentine national coat of arms centered on the white band (an oval with clasped hands holding a pike topped with a red Phrygian cap on a sky-blue ground, surrounded by green laurel and a golden sunburst above). Black text reading "EN UNION Y LIBERTAD" arches below.

flags.name: Santa Isabel
flags.file: Jauca 2, Santa Isabel, Puerto Rico - panoramio.jpg

flags.name: flag of Minsk
flags.description: A blue field bearing a central figure of the Virgin Mary in red and dark blue robes, standing on a white cloud, flanked by four kneeling angels in white robes with halos and outstretched wings.

flags.name: Nishan Sahib
flags.description: A triangular saffron (or navy blue) flag bearing a black Khanda emblem (a double-edged sword between two curved kirpans circling a chakkar) centered. A tassel hangs from the fly point.

flags.name: Continental Union Flag
flags.description: Thirteen alternating horizontal stripes of red and white (seven red, six white), with the British Union Jack (without the red saltire of Saint Patrick) in the upper hoist canton.

flags.name: Flag of Chuquisaca & Sucre
flags.description: A yellow field bearing a red Burgundy saltire centered — a diagonal X-shape with jagged, ragged edges resembling pruned tree branches. Centered over the saltire, a gold ducal crown set with green and red gemstones.

flags.name: Flag of the German-speaking Community of Belgium
flags.file: Flag of the German Community in Belgium.svg
flags.description: A white field bearing a centered red Belgian lion rampant, encircled by nine small blue flower-shaped pentagonal devices arranged in a circle around it.

flags.name: flag of Bogotá
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of yellow (top) and red, with the Bogotá coat of arms centered: a blue shield bordered with gold heraldic ornaments bearing a black eagle holding a red pomegranate, surmounted by a small gold crown.

flags.name: flag of Zeeland
flags.description: A field of alternating white and blue wavy horizontal bands, with the Zeeland coat of arms centered: a yellow shield bearing a red lion rising from blue and white waves, surmounted by a crowned crest.

flags.name: flag of Groningen
flags.description: A white field divided by a green Nordic-style cross (shifted toward the hoist), with the upper hoist quarter red, upper fly blue, lower hoist blue, and lower fly red.

flags.name: flag of Gelderland
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), yellow, and black.

flags.name: flag of Perak
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of white, yellow, and black.

flags.name: flag of North Holland
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of yellow (top), red, and blue.

flags.name: flag of South Holland
flags.description: A yellow field bearing a red lion rampant outlined in black, facing the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Bryansk Oblast
flags.description: A dark red field bearing the Bryansk Oblast coat of arms centered: a blue shield bearing a yellow fir tree above a yellow plow and red bar, surmounted by a gold crown and framed by red-yellow-green ribbon bows.

flags.name: flag of Vologda Oblast
flags.description: Two equal vertical bands of white (hoist, wide) and red (narrow), with the Vologda coat of arms in the upper hoist (a red shield bearing a hand holding a sword and orb, surmounted by a crown).

flags.name: flag of Santa Cruz Province
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de Santa Cruz.svg
flags.description: Two horizontal bands: light blue above, dark blue and white wavy stripes below representing the sea. Centered over the horizon is a stylized scene of a snow-capped brown mountain backed by a yellow rising sun with rays; four small white five-pointed stars sit in the upper sky beside the mountain.

flags.name: flag of Chelyabinsk Oblast
flags.description: Three horizontal bands: red (top), yellow (narrow center stripe), red below. A white camel with a yellow saddle stands centered on the flag, straddling all three bands.

flags.name: flag of Sakhalin Oblast
flags.description: A solid teal-blue field bearing a stylized white outline map of Sakhalin Island (vertical, at the hoist) and the Kuril Islands (chain extending to the fly).

flags.name: flag of Arkhangelsk Oblast
flags.description: A white field bearing a light blue saltire (diagonal cross from corner to corner); centered over the saltire, the Arkhangelsk coat of arms — a small shield ensigned by an imperial crown and wreathed by golden oak leaves, the shield itself depicting the Archangel Michael.

flags.name: flag of Macedonia (Greece)
flags.description: A blue field bearing a centered yellow sun in the Vergina Star style — sixteen sharp triangular rays radiating from a central disc.

flags.name: flag of Hesse
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and white.

flags.name: Steger
flags.file: Chicago and Eastern Illinois 265 (GP35) passing the Steger, IL Depot on November 26, 1965 (27482523861).jpg

flags.name: Fort Loramie
flags.file: St. Michael's Catholic Church in Fort Loramie, front and eastern side.jpg

flags.name: Flag of the Civil Freedom of Argentina
flags.file: Flag of the Civil Freedom of Argentina (unofficial improved version).svg

flags.name: flag of Chaco province
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia del Chaco.svg
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), white, and light blue. On the white band a brown plow is centered within a ring of yellow five-pointed stars, with a small yellow sunburst above.

flags.name: Royal Standard of Scotland
flags.description: A yellow field bearing a red rampant lion centered within a red double-line rectangular border (tressure) decorated with red fleurs-de-lis at the corners and along the sides.

flags.name: flag of Chubut Province
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia del Chubut.svg
flags.description: A light blue field with white zigzag lines along the top edge (mountains) and white wavy lines along the bottom edge (waves). Centered, a dark blue cogwheel containing a stylized white sluice gate and a vertical yellow wheat sheaf, with a yellow sun rising behind.

flags.name: flag of Ottawa
flags.description: A blue field at the hoist and a green field in the fly, with a stylized white "O" (Ottawa monogram) overlapping the boundary between the two colors.

flags.name: flag of Greater Poland Voivodeship
flags.description: A swallow-tail flag, hoist half a red rectangle bearing a white eagle with crown and wings spread; fly half white with a swallow-tail cut.

flags.name: Flag  of South Tyrol
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and red, with the Tyrolean coat of arms centered over both bands — a white shield bearing a red eagle with golden talons and a stylized crown-like crest on its head.

flags.name: flag of Córdoba Province, Argentina
flags.file: Bandera de la Provincia de Córdoba 2014.svg
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of dark red (hoist), white, and light blue, with a brown sun centered on the white band (a face surrounded by wavy and straight rays).

flags.name: flag of Acadia
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), white, and red, with a small yellow five-pointed star in the upper portion of the blue band.

flags.name: Australian Civil Aviation Ensign
flags.description: A light blue field with the British Union Jack in the canton at the upper hoist. A dark blue Scandinavian-style cross divides the field. In the fly quarter, the five white stars of the Southern Cross constellation; in the lower hoist quarter, a single seven-pointed white Commonwealth star.

flags.name: flag of Edmonton
flags.description: A blue field with a central white rectangle (panel) bearing the City of Edmonton coat of arms — a shield with a sunburst, river bend, and crown — above the text "THE CITY OF EDMONTON". A purple banner across the shield reads "INDUSTRY · INTEGRITY · PROGRESS".

flags.name: Royal Air Force Ensign
flags.file: Air Force Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg
flags.description: A light blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and the RAF roundel (concentric circles of dark blue, white, and red) in the fly.

flags.name: flag of San Francisco
flags.description: A white field bordered in gold, bearing a centered brown phoenix rising from a red flaming crown, with a white banner below reading "ORO EN PAZ FIERRO EN GUERRA" and "SAN FRANCISCO" in blue letters along the bottom.

flags.name: flag of Winnipeg
flags.description: Divided diagonally by a curved white band sweeping from upper hoist to lower fly: upper-hoist triangle blue, lower-fly triangle yellow. Centered on the white band, a circular medallion containing the Winnipeg coat of arms (white flower, brown castle gate, blue scroll reading "UNUM CUM VIRTUTE MULTORUM") within a blue ring labeled "CITY OF WINNIPEG".

flags.name: flag of West Flanders
flags.description: A field divided into a rayonné pattern of alternating blue and yellow triangular rays radiating from the center, with a red escutcheon (small shield) centered.

flags.name: flag of Krasnoyarsk Krai
flags.description: A solid red field bearing the Krasnoyarsk Krai coat of arms centered — a small shield with a rampant golden lion holding a shovel and sickle, surmounted by a golden crown and wreathed in golden oak and cedar branches with a blue ribbon.

flags.name: flag of Indianapolis
flags.description: A blue field divided by a white cross (vertical and horizontal bands) with a red disc centered at the intersection bearing a white five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Baltimore
flags.description: A field divided into vertical stripes of yellow and black in alternating jagged shapes (Maryland-style Calvert quartering), with a black-bordered yellow shield centered containing the gray Battle Monument of Baltimore.

flags.name: flag of Denver
flags.description: A blue field with two large red triangles (mountains) rising from the lower edge, edged in white. Above the mountains, a yellow disc (sun) on the blue sky.

flags.name: flag of Minneapolis
flags.description: A royal blue pennant on a white field or background with a white circle on a blue pennant divided by four parts; each of the four parts of the circle containing a blue symbol, a building; a cogged wheel and steel square; a ship's wheel; a microscope.

flags.name: flag of Milwaukee
flags.description: A light blue field bearing a centered emblem of a gear, ship, factory, and city skyline with industry symbols. "MILWAUKEE" appears in red letters across the bottom; "1846" appears in yellow on the right.

flags.name: flag of Rio de Janeiro
flags.file: Bandeira da cidade do Rio de Janeiro.svg
flags.description: A white field with a light blue saltire (X-shape) extending to the corners, bearing the Rio de Janeiro city coat of arms centered: a red shield with crossed arrows and a globe, surmounted by a red mural crown and flanked by two green dolphins.

flags.name: flag of Vannes
flags.description: A red field bearing a white ermine (small mammal) walking toward the hoist with a scarf decorated with black ermine spots flowing from its collar back toward the fly.

flags.name: Patriote flag
flags.file: Flag of the Patriote movement (Lower Canada).svg
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and red.

flags.name: flag and coat of arms of Normandy
flags.description: A red field bearing two gold lions stacked one above the other, both facing the hoist, with blue claws and tongues.

flags.name: Union Jack
flags.description: A blue field bearing a red Saint George's cross (vertical and horizontal red bands) fimbriated in white, overlaid on a white saltire (combined with a red saltire of Saint Patrick, both fimbriated).

flags.name: Appleton International Airport
flags.file: Appleton International Airport Tower and Gulfstream Hangar.jpg

flags.name: flag of the Second Spanish Republic
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red, yellow, and purple, with the coat of arms of the Spanish Republic centered on the yellow band (a quartered shield supported by two columns with crown above).

flags.name: flag of Barcelona
flags.description: Quartered: upper hoist and lower fly are white with a red cross of Saint George; upper fly and lower hoist are paly of yellow and red (alternating vertical yellow and red stripes — the Senyera).

flags.name: flag of the Croatian Republic of Herzeg-Bosnia
flags.file: Flag of the Croatian Republic of Herzeg-Bosnia.svg
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red, white, and blue, with the coat of arms of Herzeg-Bosnia centered on the white band — a small red-and-white checked shield bordered in gold, ensigned by a gold crown.

flags.name: flag of Cleveland
flags.description: Three equal vertical stripes of red, white, and blue. Centered on the white stripe, a red-bordered white shield reading "CLEVELAND" above the year "1796" in a wreath, with the motto "PROGRESS & PROSPERITY" on a banner below.

flags.name: flag of Cusco
flags.description: Seven equal horizontal bands of the rainbow — red, orange, yellow, green, light blue, blue, and purple — bearing a centered gold Inca sun disc with an anthropomorphic face.

flags.name: bendy
flags.description: A heraldic shield bendy of red and white — four diagonal stripes running from upper-left to lower-right, alternating red and white.

flags.name: flag of Milan
flags.description: A white field bearing a red Saint George's cross (vertical and horizontal red bands) extending to the edges.

flags.name: Q3744856
flags.description: A green field with a green vertical stripe at the hoist bearing a yellow upright spear flanked by two yellow swords; the fly extends as two white triangular tongues (pennant tips) edged in green.

flags.name: Lalandia
flags.description: Lalandia is the name of three Danish holiday resorts owned by Parken Sport & Entertainment. The original Lalandia Rødby is located in Rødbyhavn, with additional activity centres in Billund (2009) and Søndervig (2022).

flags.name: flag of Bryansk
flags.description: Two horizontal bands, red (top, larger) and green (bottom). Centered straddling the divide, a yellow naval cannon on a wheeled wooden carriage facing the hoist, flanked by two stacked pyramids of black cannonballs.

flags.name: flag of Zagreb County
flags.description: A blue field bearing the Zagreb coat of arms centered: a blue shield bordered in yellow showing a white three-towered castle, a yellow six-pointed star in the upper hoist, and a white crescent in the upper fly.

flags.name: flag and coat of arms of Kelantan
flags.flagName: flag and coat of arms of Kelantan
flags.description: A red field bearing a white emblem centered: a horizontal crescent supporting a five-pointed star flanked by two crossed kris (wavy daggers) and two upright spears.

flags.name: flag of Krasnoyarsk
flags.description: Divided by a centered yellow cross extending to the edges, with the upper hoist quarter red, upper fly blue, lower hoist blue, lower fly red. A red Krasnoyarsk shield with a yellow rampant lion holding tools is centered on the cross, topped by a yellow mural crown.

flags.name: flag of Melaka
flags.description: A red field with a gold heraldic emblem at the upper hoist: a wreath of grain encircling a small shield (yellow with red horizontal stripes); above the shield, a green crescent.

flags.name: flag of Naberezhnye Chelny
flags.description: A light blue field with a stylized yellow ancient sailing ship (with red and green sails) centered above a white wavy band along the lower edge representing water.

flags.name: flag and coat of arms of Negeri Sembilan
flags.flagName: flag and coat of arms of Negeri Sembilan
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red over white, with a blue canton at the upper hoist bearing a yellow crescent and a yellow five-pointed star.

flags.name: flag of Odesa
flags.description: Three equal vertical stripes of red, white, and yellow, with the Odesa coat of arms centered on the white stripe — a red shield bearing a white anchor, ensigned with a silver mural crown and bordered by an orange decorative frame.

flags.name: flag of Ostashkov
flags.description: A green field with a white saltire (X-shaped cross) extending corner to corner, dividing the field into four green triangles.

flags.name: flag and coat of arms of Pahang
flags.flagName: flag and coat of arms of Pahang
flags.description: A yellow field with a black right triangle in the upper hoist quarter, edged along its hypotenuse by a red triangle.

flags.name: flag of Penang
flags.description: Three equal vertical stripes of blue, white, and yellow; centered on the white stripe is a green coconut palm tree growing from a small green hillock.

flags.name: flag of Sokolsky District
flags.description: A green field with a vertical blue stripe down the center. Over the stripe, a yellow falcon stands with wings spread atop a horizontal scroll of white paper or fabric.

flags.name: flag and coat of arms of Terengganu
flags.flagName: flag and coat of arms of Terengganu
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and black.

flags.name: flag of the Federal Customs Service
flags.description: A yellow field with a horizontal white wall of crenellated bricks across the upper portion (with rounded battlements). A yellow Bactrian camel with a yellow saddle stands centered on the wall; the field below the wall is green.

flags.name: Flags of Kharkiv
flags.description: A solid green field with the city coat of arms centered: a green shield bordered yellow containing a yellow cornucopia spilling fruit and flowers, with a caduceus (winged staff with two serpents) crossed behind it.

flags.name: flag of Chelyabinsk
flags.description: A red field with a wide yellow horizontal stripe across the center. A white camel with a yellow saddle stands centered on the flag, straddling all three areas.

flags.name: flag of Chernihiv
flags.description: A white field bordered top and bottom by horizontal yellow stripes. Centered, a black double-headed eagle with a small red shield on its chest, a yellow scepter, and a yellow crown above.

flags.name: Flag of Santa Cruz Department
flags.file: Organisk utvikling 2. Er den levende naturen vesensforskjellig fra den døde? (Kristine Bonnevie, 1929).pdf

flags.name: bear flag
flags.description: 7 equal horizontal stripes with bark brown and the top, white in the middle, and black on the bottom. The other stripes have colors in between. Abear paw silhouette covers the upper left quadrant.

flags.name: Bennington flag
flags.description: Thirteen alternating horizontal stripes of red and white (seven red, six white), with a blue canton in the upper hoist bearing thirteen white seven-pointed stars arranged in an arc around the large white numerals "76".

flags.name: Betsy Ross flag
flags.description: Thirteen alternating horizontal stripes of red and white (seven red, six white), with a blue canton in the upper hoist bearing thirteen white five-pointed stars arranged in a circle.

flags.name: Coat of arms of the Macedonian Orthodox Church – Archdiocese of Ohrid
flags.flagName: Coat of arms of the Macedonian Orthodox Church – Archdiocese of Ohrid

flags.name: flag and coat of arms of Johor
flags.flagName: flag and coat of arms of Johor
flags.description: A black field with a white crescent enclosing a white five-pointed star, centered.

flags.name: flag of Acadiana
flags.description: Divided into three triangular fields meeting at center: white (hoist) bearing a yellow five-pointed star, dark blue (upper fly) bearing three white fleurs-de-lis, and red (lower fly) bearing a yellow castle.

flags.name: flag of Baton Rouge
flags.description: A red field with the city coat of arms in the hoist (a shield divided into a blue field with a white fleur-de-lis and a white field with a castle, beneath a Union Jack chief), and "Baton Rouge" in large flowing white script across the fly.

flags.name: flag of Bohol
flags.description: Three equal vertical stripes of blue, white, and red. Centered on the white stripe, a shield containing three green hills with a yellow star above, crossed by gold swords.

flags.name: flag of Buffalo, New York
flags.description: A dark blue field with a large white sunburst (white lightning-bolt rays and stars radiating outward) centered, surrounding a small circular blue-and-white scene of a ship and waterfront.

flags.name: flag of Cape Town
flags.file: Flag of Cape Town, South Africa.svg

flags.name: flag of Cincinnati
flags.description: A white field crossed by four wavy blue horizontal stripes representing the Ohio River. Centered is a large red letter "C" enclosing a white disc bearing the Latin motto "JUNCTA JUVANT" above a balance scale, a sword, and a caduceus. A small red mural crown sits above the C.

flags.name: flag of Dorset
flags.description: A yellow field bearing a white Scandinavian-style cross fimbriated in red — the cross offset toward the hoist.

flags.name: flag of Jacksonville
flags.description: A horizontal bicolor of yellow (top) with white sunburst rays and orange (bottom). A brown equestrian statue (Andrew Jackson on horseback) is centered across the boundary, with "CITY OF JACKSONVILLE, FLORIDA" arched in white text below and a yellow silhouette of the county shape in the lower fly.

flags.name: flag of Las Vegas
flags.description: A blue field with a grey diagonal band running from lower hoist to upper fly. At the upper hoist over the diagonal, a circular seal: "CITY OF LAS VEGAS / NEVADA" around a stylized desert-city emblem.

flags.name: flag of Lisbon
flags.description: A field divided diagonally into alternating black and white triangles meeting at center, with the Lisbon coat of arms centered: a black shield bordered in gold bearing a sailing ship on green waves flanked by two black ravens, surmounted by a gold mural crown. White scrolls below read "MUI NOBRE E SEMPRE LEAL CIDADE DE LISBOA".

flags.name: flag of Madison, Wisconsin
flags.description: A light blue field with a wide white diagonal band running from the lower hoist to the upper fly. Centered on the band is a stylized black four-pointed Zia-style symbol with a yellow disc at its center.

flags.name: flag of New England
flags.description: A red field with a white canton at the upper hoist containing a green pine tree.

flags.name: flag of New Orleans
flags.description: Three horizontal bands of red (narrow, top), white (wide, middle), and dark blue (narrow, bottom), with three gold fleurs-de-lis arranged in a triangle (two above, one below) centered on the white band.

flags.name: flag of Philadelphia

flags.description: A dark blue field with the large gold Seal of Georgia centered (showing the Constitution arch with three columns and a soldier). Below the seal is a gold banner reading "GEORGIA'S HISTORY" displaying five small historical U.S. and Georgia flags, with "IN GOD WE TRUST" beneath.

flags.name: Red Ensign of Great Britain
flags.description: A red field with a small Union Flag of Great Britain (pre-1801, without the cross of St. Patrick) in the canton at the hoist.

flags.name: flag of the University of West Florida
flag of Leon County
flags.description: A white field with a green circular emblem centered showing the outline of Florida with a small capitol building above the word "LEON", encircled by the text "FLORIDA'S CAPITAL COUNTY".

flags.name: flag of the Conch Republic
flags.description: A dark blue field with a large yellow sun in the center surrounding a golden disk containing a conch shell. White text "CONCH REPUBLIC" arches above and "KEY WEST" appears in the lower hoist, with "1828" beside the sun and scattered small white stars around it.

flags.name: North Florida Regional Medical Center flag
flags.flagName: North Florida Regional Medical Center flag

flags.name: American Police Hall of Fame flag
flags.flagName: American Police Hall of Fame flag

flags.name: 1980 flag of Orlando
flags.description: A field divided horizontally with white above and dark blue below, bearing a centered emblem depicting the Orlando skyline with skyscrapers, a fountain, and palm trees, captioned "CITY of ORLANDO" on a blue ribbon.

flags.name: flag of Homestead
flags.description: A white field with a centered arch-shaped emblem: green palm trees frame an orange sunset over green fields with a small plane and tractor, with "FLORIDA" arching at the top and "CITY OF HOMESTEAD 1913" on a yellow banner below.

flags.name: flag of the University of Minnesota
flag of Palm Beach County
flags.file: Flag of Palm Beach County, Florida.png
flags.description: A pale blue field with the circular Palm Beach County seal centered, showing a green palm tree against a sunset of red, purple, and orange over a blue ocean, encircled by the text "PALM BEACH COUNTY FLORIDA".

flags.name: flag of Boca Raton
flags.description: Three equal horizontal bands of light blue, white, and green. The city seal sits at the hoist, centered vertically over the white band — a circular blue-bordered seal reading "BOCA RATON · FLORIDA" around a green landscape with a fishing scene.

flags.name: flag of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration
flags.description: A dark blue field with a large white disc centered, containing a red triangle that encloses a blue circle with a stylized white seagull. The NOAA logo design.

flags.name: flag of West Florida
flags.description: A medium blue field with a single large white five-pointed star centered.

flags.name: flag of the New Orleans Police Department
flag of Westwego
flags.description: A vertical tricolor of blue, white, and red with "CITY OF" in white running vertically on the blue stripe and "WESTWEGO" running vertically on the red stripe. A circular city seal showing a sailboat on water sits centered on the white stripe.

flags.name: New Zealand White Ensign
flags.description: A white field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and in the fly the Southern Cross constellation (four red five-pointed stars in a cross pattern plus a smaller fifth).

flags.name: flag of the European Union
flags.description: A circle of twelve five-pointed yellow stars on a blue field.

flags.name: Commodore Perry flag
flags.file: DONT GIVE UP THE SHIP flag.svg
flags.description: A dark blue field with "DONT GIVE UP THE SHIP" in large white hand-lettered capitals across two lines.

flags.name: Todd's Bear Flag
flags.description: A white field with a black five-pointed star in the upper hoist and a black walking bear silhouette to its right. "CALIFORNIA REPUBLIC." appears in black serif text below them, and a thick black horizontal stripe runs along the bottom edge.

flags.name: flag of Cupertino
flags.description: A dark blue field with a centered white rectangle depicting an astronaut helmet with a rising sun behind it, the text "EST. 1955" curving below, and "CUPERTINO" in white block letters across the lower portion of the field.

flags.name: flag of the Santa Clara County Fire Department
flag of Dayton
flags.description: A light blue field bearing two diagonal stripes (one blue, one white, edged in white) running from the upper fly to the lower hoist, with a green triangular wedge in the lower hoist corner.

flags.name: flag of REWE
flags.description: A solid red field with the white wordmark "REWE" centered in large bold letters.

flags.name: Tino Rangatiratanga flag
flags.description: Divided into three horizontal sections (black top, white middle, red bottom) by a stylized white koru (spiral fern frond) that curls from the hoist into the fly.

flags.name: Tree City USA flag
flags.description: A white field bearing a green circle (with a light blue inner area) containing a green tree silhouette, and the words "TREE CITY USA" in green below.

flags.name: flag of Alameda County
flags.description: A white field with a yellow vertical stripe and a dark blue vertical stripe at the fly bearing five white five-pointed stars arranged vertically. The oval Alameda County seal sits at the hoist, depicting white mountains, water with birds, and a yellow sunburst, encircled by "COUNTY OF ALAMEDA CALIFORNIA".

flags.name: Trump flag

flags.name: flag of Bourgogne-Franche-Comté
flags.description: A flag quartered into four equal sections: the upper hoist is white with red crenellations and gold fleurs-de-lis on white; the upper fly is blue with a gold lion rampant on a field of gold billets; the lower hoist is blue with a gold lion rampant on a field of gold billets; the lower fly bears the diagonal blue and yellow bands of Burgundy edged in red.

flags.name: flag of the Council of Europe
flags.file: Logo of the Council of Europe (no lettering).svg

flags.name: 1824 flag
flags.description: A vertical tricolor of green, white, and red with the year "1824" in black serif numerals on the central white stripe.

flags.name: Royal New Zealand Air Force Ensign

flags.name: flag of Annecy

flags.name: flag of Besançon

flags.name: flag of Calais

flags.name: flag of Dunkirk

flags.name: flag of Grenoble

flags.name: flag of Mulhouse
flags.description: A white field overlaid with a red sunburst of curving wavy rays radiating from the center, with a small white square in the upper hoist bearing a red mill wheel.

flags.name: flag of Metz
flags.description: A vertical bicolor divided down the middle, white at the hoist and black at the fly.

flags.name: flag of Orléans
flags.description: A vertical bicolor of yellow (hoist) and red.

flags.name: flag of Reims
flags.description: Two equal horizontal bands of blue (top) and white.

flags.name: flag of Toulon

flags.name: flag of Saint-Tropez
flags.description: Three equal vertical bands of red (hoist), white, and red.

flags.name: flag of Arles

flags.name: flag of Vincennes

flags.name: flag of Annemasse

flags.name: flag of Thonon-les-Bains

The Agen coat of arms is centered: a red shield divided vertically, the hoist half bearing a white eagle on a banner reading "Agen", the fly half bearing a yellow castle on red.

flags.name: flag of Toul

flags.name: flag of Aix-en-Provence
flags.description: A vertical bicolor, red at the hoist and yellow at the fly.

Centered, a black-and-white puffin holds a heraldic sail showing the cross of St. Andrew, ermine spots, and a golden lion. Three white fish swim along the bottom edge.

flags.name: flag of Saint-Claude

flags.name: flag of Gujan-Mestras

flags.name: flag of Étrembières

A purple circle on a yellow triangle sits in the lower hoist (the intersex inclusion).

flags.name: flag of Foix

flags.description: A blue field with and eagle standing on a shield facing to the left. The bird is holding arrows and olive branches. There is text above and below. The lower text is on a waving banner. Top text reads "DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE". The bottom text is latin and reads "QUI DOMINA JUSTITIA SEQUITUR".

flags.name: flag of Dordogne
flags.description: A red field bearing three gold lions rampant facing the hoist (two above, one below), each with blue claws and a small blue crown.

flags.name: flag of the Olympic Regional Development Authority
